last_week_candidates.summary: 1. AI Development and Management Design AI Virtual Assistants: Create virtual AI agents capable of performing various tasks, from customer service to advanced process automation. Full Project Lifecycle: Manage the complete development process from ideation to...
last_week_candidates.full_description: 1. AI Development and Management Design AI Virtual Assistants: Create virtual AI agents capable of performing various tasks, from customer service to advanced process automation. Full Project Lifecycle: Manage the complete development process from ideation to deployment, including prompt engineering, data processing, and integration. Customization of AI Agents: Tailor AI agents to fit specific organizational needs, adjusting their behavior and functionality. Work with Claude AI and Other Platforms: Build agents using Claude and other leading AI platforms, ensuring compatibility and optimization. 2. AI Integration and Automation Integration with Existing Systems: Integrate AI virtual agents into existing business systems, CRM platforms, or enterprise software. Automate Workflows: Develop AI models to automate internal business processes, such as customer queries, appointment scheduling, data entry, etc. API Integration: Connect AI agents with external APIs to extend their capabilities, such as payment gateways, third-party services, or cloud-based applications. 3. Prompt Engineering Develop Advanced Prompts: Write and refine natural language prompts to optimize AI responses for specific tasks, ensuring accurate and efficient output. Training and Fine-tuning: Train AI agents on specific datasets to improve accuracy and relevance in their tasks. Maintain and Update Prompts: Regularly review and update prompts to reflect evolving needs and maintain relevance. 4. AI Testing and Optimization Test AI Agents: Conduct rigorous testing on virtual assistants to ensure they operate smoothly and effectively, identifying and resolving potential issues. Optimize AI Performance: Regularly evaluate the performance of AI agents, fine-tuning their algorithms for better results and user experience. Error Handling: Design and implement error management systems to handle edge cases and unexpected inputs from users. 5. User Experience and Interaction Design Build Interactive Interfaces: Create user-friendly interfaces and conversational flows for AI agents, ensuring they are intuitive and efficient for end-users. Develop Multi-channel AI Assistants: Ensure that AI agents can function across different communication channels (website, email, social media, etc.). Personalization of AI Responses: Create personalized experiences for users based on their preferences, behaviors, and interactions. 6. Monitoring and Maintenance Ongoing Monitoring: Continuously monitor AI agents for performance, user interactions, and system errors. Analytics & Reporting: Generate performance reports on AI interactions, analyzing user engagement and the effectiveness of responses. Troubleshooting: Quickly resolve any issues or bugs reported by users or internal teams. 7. Security and Privacy Data Privacy: Ensure that AI agents comply with privacy and data security regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA) when processing user data. Secure Communication: Implement security protocols for all interactions between users and the AI agents to safeguard sensitive information. 8. Documentation and Training Create Documentation: Develop comprehensive documentation on the design, functionality, and maintenance of the AI virtual assistants. Provide Internal Training: Train internal teams on how to interact with, manage, and optimize AI systems. 9. Collaboration and Communication Work with Cross-functional Teams: Collaborate with developers, business analysts, and stakeholders to align AI systems with business goals. Client Communication: Communicate directly with clients to understand their needs and provide tailored AI solutions. 10. Research and Development Stay Up-to-date on AI Trends: Continuously research the latest developments in AI technologies, tools, and platforms to bring innovative solutions to the organization. Experiment with New Technologies: Test and implement emerging AI frameworks, platforms, and tools to enhance capabilities. Desired Experience and Skills Experience: At least 3 years of experience in AI development, with specific expertise in virtual assistants, agents, and prompt engineering. Platforms: Strong experience with Claude, GPT-based models (e.g., GPT-4), and other AI platforms such as Dialogflow, Rasa, or IBM Watson. Programming: Proficiency in Python, JavaScript, or other languages commonly used in AI development. AI Frameworks: Familiarity with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and OpenAI’s API. Problem-solving: Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to think critically when optimizing and troubleshooting AI systems. Communication: Strong communication skills to document processes and explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

last_week_candidates.summary: About DCB Digital We're a growing Queensland-based digital marketing agency working with professional services and trades businesses across Australia. We specialise in web design, SEO, paid ads, and social media, and we work with clients who are serious about...
last_week_candidates.full_description: About DCB Digital We're a growing Queensland-based digital marketing agency working with professional services and trades businesses across Australia. We specialise in web design, SEO, paid ads, and social media, and we work with clients who are serious about getting results. We're a small, focused team that cares about doing good work properly. Everyone here is across real client accounts from day one and expected to take ownership of their area without needing to be managed closely. About the role We're looking for a Digital Marketing Coordinator who wants to grow with us, not just fill a seat. This is a broad role and that's intentional. You'll work directly alongside the Directors across content creation, social media, AI, automations, operations, systems, and client support. In the short term you'll also be across social media delivery as we transition away from that service. For the right person, that's an opportunity to get across every part of how a digital agency runs and build from there. We use AI properly here. Not as a gimmick, but as a core part of how we work. We're building automations, running AI agents, and integrating AI tools across the agency as it grows. This person needs to be genuinely across that world, not just familiar with it. We're not looking for someone who needs a lot of direction. We're looking for someone who spots what needs doing, does it well, and is always thinking about how to do it better. How we work We don't measure success by how many tasks got completed. We measure it by outcomes. Every piece of work we do has a reason behind it and we expect everyone on the team to understand that reason, not just execute the task. If you're the kind of person who asks "what are we actually trying to achieve here" before diving in, you'll fit right in. If you'd rather just be told what to do and get it done, this probably isn't the right place for you. We're always looking at how we can do things better, get stronger results for our clients, and improve how the agency runs. We want someone who thinks the same way, comes with ideas, and isn't satisfied with good enough. What you'll be doing Director and client support Managing the Directors' inboxes and calendars Scheduling meetings, managing deadlines, and protecting their time Drafting and responding to emails on last_week_candidates.full_description: Company: Moon Media Location: Remote Type: Full-Time Working Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST Experience Level: Mid-Senior --- About Moon Media We're a fast-growing creative agency that helps brands dominate short-form content. Our clients include companies with millions of followers, and our systems power the production and management of hundreds of videos every month. But we're not just building content. We're building the infrastructure behind it. At Moon Media, **Notion is the backbone of our operations.** From project management and client delivery to production tracking, internal dashboards, documentation, and workflows, nearly everything runs through our Notion workspace. As we continue to scale, we're looking for someone who can help us build the next generation of our internal operating system. If your first instinct when you see an inefficient process is, *"There's a better way to build this,"* we'd love to meet you. --- The Role As our **Notion Systems Specialist + Automation**, you'll be responsible for designing, building, maintaining, and continuously improving the systems that power Moon Media. You'll work directly with the Founder and Head of Operations to improve our Notion workspace, automate repetitive processes, and create scalable solutions that help the business operate more efficiently. This is not an IT support role or a traditional virtual assistant position. Instead, you'll become our internal systems expert, building the infrastructure that supports our operations as we continue to grow. --- What You'll Be Working On: Priority #1: Notion Systems This will be the primary focus of your role. You'll help us: * Maintain and improve our existing Notion workspace * Build new databases, dashboards, templates, and workflows * Design scalable systems for project management, production, and operations * Improve reporting and visibility across the business * Continuously optimize our internal operating system as we grow Priority #2: Automation & AI Once workflows are built inside Notion, you'll help automate them. This includes: * Automating repetitive operational tasks * Streamlining onboarding workflows * File and folder organization * Notifications and reminders * Connecting software platforms to eliminate manual work * Researching and implementing AI tools that improve efficiency Priority #3: GoHighLevel (Nice to Have) GoHighLevel experience is a bonus, but it is **not** the primary focus of this role. We already have our CRM and funnels in place. We're mainly looking for someone who can support GHL automations and integrations when needed. --- Responsibilities * Build and maintain advanced Notion workspaces, databases, dashboards, and templates * Design scalable workflows that improve operational efficiency * Create native Notion automations and recommend external automation opportunities * Build automations using Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar tools * Analyze existing processes and recommend smarter system solutions * Connect software platforms to eliminate repetitive manual work * Research and implement AI tools that improve business operations * Troubleshoot and maintain existing systems and integrations * Create documentation and SOPs for new systems and workflows * Work directly with leadership to turn ideas into scalable operational solutions * Continuously improve internal workflows as the company grows --- Requirements (Non-Negotiable) * Advanced experience with Notion, including databases, relations, rollups, formulas, templates, and workspace architecture * Strong systems thinking and process optimization skills * Experience building automations using Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar platforms * Ability to design scalable workflows instead of temporary fixes * Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities * Excellent organization and documentation skills * Comfortable learning new software and technologies quickly * Self-starter who can work independently and take ownership of projects --- Nice to Have * Experience with GoHighLevel * Experience working with APIs and webhooks * Experience with Claude or other AI tools * Experience building AI workflows or AI agents * Experience building systems for agencies or fast-growing startups --- Who This Role Is For This role is for someone who genuinely enjoys building systems and making businesses operate more efficiently. You love creating clean Notion workspaces, designing workflows, connecting software, and simplifying complicated processes. You're naturally curious, proactive, and always looking for ways to improve operations through better systems. You don't wait for problems to be assigned. You identify opportunities, recommend better solutions, and build systems that save time for everyone around you. --- Why This Role Matters: Everything our team does runs through our operational systems. The solutions you build will directly impact how efficiently Moon Media operates every single day. You'll help leadership spend less time on repetitive work and more time growing the business. You'll have ownership over our internal operating systems and play a key role in shaping how Moon Media scales over the coming years. --- HOW TO APPLY: If you're passionate about Notion + automation, and building systems that make businesses run better, we'd love to hear from you! Apply Here: catnip-peak-d94.notion.site/3813b9fa536580f5bda7d0a6c68670f4 --- **IMPORTANT:** We will only consider applicants who complete the Notion application form linked above. Please do NOT reply or apply through this posting, as applications submitted here will not be reviewed.

last_week_candidates.full_description: AI / ML Engineer S16 (sx16.ai) · Remote (Philippines) · Full-time · Immediate joiner · 2+ years experience About S16 S16 (sx16.ai) is a product company building AI operations-intelligence tools for last-mile delivery and logistics operators. We turn live operational data into real-time intelligence — AI assistants, automated monitoring and alerting, performance analytics, and predictive models — that help delivery operations run reliably at scale. We are a small, fast-moving team shipping production software that is used in live operations every day. The role We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer who can build LLM-powered agents and automation end to end, with solid data science / ML chops alongside it. You will design and ship AI assistants that plug into messaging platforms and operational tools, build the data pipelines and dashboards behind them, and develop the predictive models that make the product smarter over time. This is a hands-on, full-spectrum AI role: from prompt and agent design, to the Python services that run them, to the models and data underneath. What you'll do ? Build LLM-powered agents and assistants. Design system prompts and agent behavior, integrate LLM APIs (Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, OpenAI), and handle context management, conversation memory/summarization, tool use, and reliability/guardrails. ? Ship automation and real-time monitoring. Build Python services (Flask/FastAPI) that ingest live operational data, detect exceptions, run scheduled jobs, and push alerts and notifications — including messaging integrations such as WhatsApp. ? Develop predictive and analytical models (DS/ML). For example, late-delivery prediction and route-difficulty / performance scoring: feature engineering, training, evaluation, and deployment. ? Build dashboards and scoreboards. Real-time performance views and leaderboards (Google Sheets API, Streamlit, or lightweight web apps). ? Deploy and operate. Stand up services on cloud platforms, manage secrets and API keys securely, and keep things running reliably. ? Apply computer vision where it adds value — for example, image recognition for load-out / bag-count verification using real-time object detection. What we're looking for ? 2+ years of professional experience in AI/ML engineering, data science, or a closely related software role. ? Strong programming in Python and SQL. ? Hands-on Generative AI / LLM experience and a solid data-science / machine-learning foundation (full stack detailed below). ? Startup mindset — comfortable with ambiguity, fast iteration, and end-to-end ownership. You ship. ? Immediate availability — we need someone who can start right away. Technical skills ? Languages & databases: Python, SQL, vector databases. ? Machine learning: Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy; regression, classification, clustering; feature engineering and model evaluation; hyperparameter tuning (GridSearchCV); time-series forecasting; A/B testing; statistical analysis, data preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis (EDA). ? Deep learning: TensorFlow, Keras; ANN, CNN, RNN. ? Computer vision: OpenCV, YOLOv8, real-time object detection. ? Generative AI / LLMs: large language models (LLMs), prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), embeddings, vector databases, AI chatbots, agentic AI, LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, and end-to-end LLM application development. ? Backend & deployment: REST APIs, webhooks, Flask / FastAPI; model deployment; cloud platforms (GCP / AWS / Azure, or Railway / Render / DigitalOcean). ? Data pipelines & analytics: ETL / data pipelines; SQL; medallion (bronze/silver/gold) modeling; Databricks / Spark. ? last_week_candidates.full_description: Work with an Australian Software Company We are looking for a talented .NET Developer in the Philippines to join our team as an independent contractor. You'll be working on commercial software applications using C#, .NET, and MySQL, helping to develop new features, improve existing systems, and support customers across multiple countries. Key Responsibilities • Design, develop, test, and maintain .NET applications. • Develop new features and enhancements based on business requirements. • Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and performance issues. • Create and optimize MySQL database structures, queries, stored procedures, and reports. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to software quality improvements. • Integrate applications with third-party APIs and services. • Maintain technical documentation and deployment procedures. • Collaborate with project managers, support staff, and stakeholders located in Australia. • Ensure applications meet security, performance, and reliability standards. Required Skills and Experience Essential • Minimum 3 years of professional software development experience. • Strong experience with: - C# - .NET Framework and/or .NET (Core/.NET 6+) - ASP.NET MVC, Web API, or Windows Desktop Applications - MySQL database development and administration - SQL query optimization and troubleshooting • Experience with: - Git source control - REST APIs - Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) - Software debugging and testing • Demonstrated experience using AI development tools such as ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude, or similar tools as part of the software development workflow. • Ability to evaluate, test, and refine AI-generated code rather than relying on it without review. • Strong English communication skills (written and verbal). • Reliable internet connection and suitable remote working environment. Preferred • Experience with: - MariaDB - JavaScript, HTML, CSS - POS, retail, hospitality, ERP, or business management systems • Experience working with overseas clients or distributed teams. What We Offer • Long-term contract opportunity • Flexible remote work • Exposure to Australian business software projects • Supportive and collaborative team environment • Competitive contractor rates Work Arrangement • This position is fully remote and open to candidates based in the Philippines. • Candidates located in Clark, Pampanga, or nearby areas are preferred. • While the role is currently remote, applicants should be willing to work from an office in Clark, Pampanga up to three days per week should a local office be established in the future. To Apply Please send: - Your CV/Resume - Brief summary of your .NET and MySQL experience - Expected hourly or monthly rate - Availability/start date - Start your application with the answer: What country is home to Kangaroos? - Links to GitHub, portfolio, or sample projects (if available) Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Location: Philippines (Remote) Preferred Location: Clark, Pampanga or nearby areas Employment Type: Contractor / Freelance Experience Required: 3+ Years Technology Stack: C#, .NET, ASP.NET, MySQL, Git, REST APIs

last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: Web Design & Page Layout Wordpress Elementor
last_week_candidates.summary: We're a growing UK-based digital marketing agency looking for a long-term WordPress web developer to help us build and maintain websites for our clients in the home improvement and trade industries. We use Elementor Pro and have a proven website structure for...
last_week_candidates.full_description: We're a growing UK-based digital marketing agency looking for a long-term WordPress web developer to help us build and maintain websites for our clients in the home improvement and trade industries. We use Elementor Pro and have a proven website structure for home improvement businesses, but the design would be open for you to come up with, based on the brief if the client is specific about what they are looking for. The right candidate will follow this structure closely and focus on delivering high-quality, accurate, and brand-aligned sites quickly and efficiently. This role is focused on building new websites, migrating them and updating existing client sites. We provide the plugins and tools you need to build the sites, including the following: • Elementor Pro licence • All premium plugins (fully licensed) • Hosting environment for development • Access to stock image libraries • All written content and page structure • Ongoing training and support • There will be no additional cost to you What You’ll Do: 1. Set up new client sites on a development subdomain 2. Design the site inline with the client’s brief, branding, etc. 3. Move existing content from the old website to the new site 4. Add new content provided by our team 5. Use stock images (we provide access) or reuse quality images from the original site 6. Continue building new pages on a monthly basis for SEO purposes (you’ll be trained on our exact process) 7. Maintain the website each month, making small edits, etc. 8. Migrate the site from the client's existing hosting to ours when needed; set up things like Cloudflare, CAPTCHA, SMTP Pay Structure: 1. $500 USD per website build 2. $7.50 USD per new page for ongoing monthly work (one page using our pre-built templates take less than one hour) 3. Ongoing hours (not including new website builds): 5–15 hours per week, growing over time as we onboard more clients (the goal is to get your to full-time hours) 4. $10 USD per site, per month — basic site maintenance, i.e., updating plugins, taking backups etc. 5. Additional hours paid at $7.50 USD per hour 6. As we grow, our goal is to offer you a full-time position on a monthly wage Long-Term Opportunity: This is a long-term position where hours and responsibility will increase over time. We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us, become part of our team, and contribute to the success of a fast-growing digital marketing agency. Over time, this role could evolve into many other technical areas within the business. Requirements: 1. Experience building WordPress sites using Elementor Pro 2. Strong attention to detail (structure, spacing, responsiveness) 3. Ability to follow a site structure system 4. Fluent in English 4. Able to work independently and meet deadlines 5. Flexible work hours (you can work anytime from anywhere – as long as the work is completed on time and to a high standard.)? 6. Willingness to have regular Zoom calls with me so we can keep up today with work and train you on anything needed 7. Knowledge of DNS, hosting, and basic technical website tasks 8. Be responsive on WhatsApp, i.e., keep me up-to-date with the projects Bonus Points For: 1. Familiarity with SEO basics 2. Experience working with digital marketing agencies 3. Tools We use ClickUp, GoHighLevel, Airtable (nice to have but not essential) 4. You’re up-to-date with the latest AI, such as Claude Code and you are able to help us innovate and design better ways of doing things How to Apply: 1. In your first paragraph, include the word “kangaroo” to confirm you’ve read the full post 2. Tell us about your experience building WordPress sites with Elementor 3. Share 2–3 websites you’ve built using Elementor Pro (you will be required to show me the backend of these sites during the interview) 4. Include a short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself, upload the video to YouTube and include the YouTube link – start with “Hi Oliver” and explain why you’re a great fit 5. Let us know your availability per week and preferred working hours (in your local timezone) Immediate Start: We have a website that needs to be built right away, and we have lots of other websites that need to be maintained, so we will require you to be able to start immediately after the interview if you are the right fit for the role. As part of the interview process, you will be required to show me the backend of your example sites during the interview, so if you lie and send me websites that you have not built or are not built using Elementor, then you will not be considered for the role. *** Only apply via this website. If you message me via email or phone, you will NOT be considered for this position. ***

last_week_candidates.summary: LEKKER Studios is a premium architectural and real estate photography company based in Northern New Jersey, serving the NYC metro market. We work with luxury builders, developers, architects, and top-tier real estate agents. We are a small, focused team that...
last_week_candidates.full_description: LEKKER Studios is a premium architectural and real estate photography company based in Northern New Jersey, serving the NYC metro market. We work with luxury builders, developers, architects, and top-tier real estate agents. We are a small, focused team that moves fast and does quality work. We are growing and we are ready to bring in someone who loves AI as much as we do. If you get genuinely excited about what AI can do, and you want to help build real systems for a real business, keep reading. THE OPPORTUNITY This role starts part-time: 12:00 PM to 4:00 PM Philippine Standard Time, Monday through Friday. As we grow together, the position expands to 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM PST. We want a long-term partner, not a short-term hire. The core of this role is AI. You will help us design, build, and run AI-powered workflows that make our business faster and more consistent. You will work directly with our founder and have real ownership over the systems you create. We will train you on how we work. But we need someone who can take that and run with it. WHAT YOU WILL OWN AI Systems (Your Primary Focus) Build and manage workflows using Claude AI as our primary tool Create and maintain prompt systems that produce consistent, high-quality output Own our Higgsfield AI video generation pipeline for marketing and social content Explore and implement new AI tools as the landscape evolves Connect AI tools to our CRM and operations so everything works together Document every system you build so it is repeatable CRM & Operations Manage and improve our Zoho CRM including automations and client pipelines Build SOPs for onboarding, follow-up, and project delivery Keep things on track and flag issues before they become problems Content & General Support Support video editing using Adobe tools Help with social media content batching and scheduling Inbox management, file organization, and founder support WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR Must Have: Real hands-on experience with Claude AI. Actual workflows you have built, not just awareness of it. Real hands-on experience with Higgsfield AI for video generation Familiarity with ChatGPT and prompt engineering Working knowledge of Zoho CRM Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Premiere Pro, Lightroom, or Photoshop) Strong written English Extreme attention to detail Reliable internet and a capable computer Great to Have: Experience connecting tools via Make, Zapier, or APIs Background in real estate, architecture, or luxury brand marketing Experience building and documenting SOPs WHO YOU ARE You are detail-oriented and self-directed. You figure things out before you ask. You are genuinely excited about AI because you have already used it to solve real problems. You communicate honestly. You want to grow with a company, not just fill a role. SCHEDULE & COMPENSATION Starting hours: Monday to Friday, 12:00 PM to 4:00 PM PST Growth path: Expanding to 12:00 PM to 8:00 PM PST Compensation: Performance-based. We pay well for great work. Details discussed in the interview. Location: Fully remote. Philippines-based applicants only. HOW TO APPLY We keep it simple. Send us: A short video (2 to 3 minutes). Introduce yourself and walk us through something you have actually built using Claude AI or Higgsfield AI. Screen recording is perfect. We just want to see real work. A written answer (150 to 200 words) to this question: What is the most useful AI workflow you have built, and what problem did it solve? Your resume or portfolio link Confirmation of your availability for the hours listed We read every application personally. The video is how we get to know you before we ever get on a call, so have fun with it. Show us what you can do. We are building something we are proud of. We hope you want to be part of it.

last_week_candidates.title: Remote Executive Admin & Finance (QuickBooks + AI Systems Support)
last_week_candidates.summary: JOB OVERVIEW Are you a detail-oriented, systems-minded Virtual Professional who enjoys keeping financial records organized, building clean trackers, and turning messy information into clear workflows? We are looking for a proactive Executive Admin & Finance...
last_week_candidates.full_description: JOB OVERVIEW Are you a detail-oriented, systems-minded Virtual Professional who enjoys keeping financial records organized, building clean trackers, and turning messy information into clear workflows? We are looking for a proactive Executive Admin & Finance Virtual Professional who can support finance, admin, operations, reporting, and process documentation. This role is ideal for someone who is accurate with numbers, comfortable with QuickBooks or similar accounting tools, and excited about using AI responsibly to make work clearer, faster, and better documented. This is not just a task-support role. We are looking for someone who thinks in systems - someone who enjoys creating SOPs, checklists, trackers, dashboards, templates, and better ways of managing recurring work. You may be a great fit if you like organizing details, catching inconsistencies, improving processes, and helping leadership stay financially informed and operationally prepared. What You Will Do You will support day-to-day finance, admin, reporting, documentation, and workflow improvement tasks. Finance & Bookkeeping Support • Track invoices, receipts, payments, payables, receivables, reimbursements, and vendor records. • Support QuickBooks Online or similar accounting systems with organized data entry, categorization, and cleanup. • Assist with bank and credit card reconciliation support. • Help maintain clean records for transactions, vendors, invoices, and supporting documents. • Prepare financial trackers, summaries, simple reports, and management updates. • Organize PDFs, screenshots, receipts, invoices, and related files so records are easy to find and review. • Spot missing information, duplicate entries, inconsistent categories, and reporting gaps before they become bigger issues. Executive Admin & Operations Support • Manage calendars, reminders, meetings, follow-ups, deadlines, and recurring priorities. • Coordinate administrative details, project trackers, vendor information, forms, and documentation. • Support research, file organization, task follow-through, and internal updates. • Give clear progress updates, ask smart questions, and close communication loops. • Handle sensitive business and administrative information with discretion and professionalism. Systems, SOPs & AI-Assisted Workflow Support • Create and maintain SOPs, checklists, trackers, dashboards, templates, and process documentation. • Turn scattered notes, screenshots, recordings, inbox items, or financial details into clear action steps. • Use AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, or similar platforms to support summaries, research, documentation, first drafts, and workflow organization. • Build simple prompt templates or AI-assisted workflows that make recurring tasks cleaner and faster. • Review and verify AI output before sharing it. • Protect confidential information and avoid relying on unchecked AI-generated answers. • Recommend practical improvements when work is messy, manual, duplicated, or unclear. Who We Are Looking For The ideal candidate is organized, accurate, reliable, and comfortable working independently in a remote setup. You should enjoy finance/admin work, but also be curious about systems, documentation, and smarter ways to get things done. You may be a great fit if you: • Have at least 2 years of experience in finance/admin, bookkeeping support, executive admin, operations, or a related role. • Have hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online or a similar accounting platform such as Xero, FreshBooks, Zoho Books, NetSuite, or similar tools. • Are comfortable handling invoice tracking, AP/AR support, vendor records, reconciliation support, reporting, or financial admin tasks. • Have strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for trackers, formulas, organized data, and reporting. • Are highly detail-oriented and careful with numbers, deadlines, and confidential information. • Can write clear updates in English and communicate proactively. • Naturally organize recurring work into checklists, templates, SOPs, trackers, or dashboards. • Are comfortable using AI tools as a work partner for drafting, summarizing, organizing, researching, and improving documentation. • Understand that AI output must still be checked, verified, and handled responsibly. • Are resourceful, coachable, proactive, and able to work with minimal supervision. Preferred Experience: Experience with any of the following is a plus: • QuickBooks Online cleanup, categorization, reconciliation support, or financial reporting. • Accounts payable, accounts receivable, invoice tracking, or vendor management. • KPI dashboards, management reports, data cleanup, or reporting packs. • SOP creation, Loom/process videos, workflow documentation, trackers, or process maps. • Project management tools such as ClickUp, Asana, Monday.com, Trello, Notion, or Airtable. • CRM tools, automation tools, Zapier, Make, or similar platforms. • Supporting executives, operators, finance teams, or operations-heavy businesses. • Coordinating applications, vendor setup, compliance research, permits, or project trackers. • Using AI tools to improve admin, finance, reporting, documentation, or research workflows. Tech & Infrastructure Requirements To ensure a smooth and reliable remote work experience, applicants must have: • Intel i5 10th Gen / AMD Ryzen 5 or higher preferred. • Minimum 8GB RAM. • Laptop or PC preferably less than 3 years old. • Stable internet connection of at least 50-100 Mbps preferred. • Backup internet connection. • Quality webcam, microphone, and headset. Screenshots of device specs and internet speed test may be requested during the application process. You Will Thrive in This Role If... • You enjoy bringing order to messy information. • You like working with numbers, reports, trackers, records, and follow-ups. • You often think, "There has to be a better system for this." • You can follow instructions carefully but also think ahead. • You ask thoughtful questions when information is missing. • You give clear updates without needing to be chased. • You enjoy creating checklists, documentation, templates, and better workflows. • You use AI thoughtfully to improve work quality, not to replace judgment. • You want a long-term remote role where reliability, ownership, communication, and continuous improvement matter. This May Not Be the Best Fit If... • You prefer task-by-task instructions and do not enjoy organizing ambiguity. • You are uncomfortable with financial records, details, deadlines, or accuracy checks. • You do not like documenting processes or creating trackers. • You are not open to learning new systems or AI tools. • You use AI as a shortcut without checking the output. • You struggle with proactive communication or independent remote work. Why You Will Love This Opportunity • Full-time remote work. • Weekends off. • Paid holidays and PTO eligibility. • HMO eligibility after the required tenure period. • Family Medical Incentive eligibility. • PAG-IBIG and referral incentives. • Learning sessions and growth opportunities. • Supportive, growth-driven remote community. • Opportunity to strengthen finance, admin, systems, documentation, and AI workflow skills. How to Apply: Please submit: • Your updated resume. • Your answers to the application questions below. Application Questions 1. Tell us about your finance, bookkeeping support, executive admin, or operations experience. Which tools have you used? 2. Walk us through how you would reconcile a bank or credit card account in QuickBooks Online, or how you would clean up a messy invoice/payment tracker. 3. Which AI tools have you used at work? Share one specific example of how you used AI to organize information, save time, improve documentation, or create a better workflow. How did you check the output for accuracy? Applications with clear, specific answers will be prioritized. We are especially interested in candidates who can show real examples of finance/admin accuracy, systems thinking, responsible AI use, and proactive communication. Apply today and build a meaningful remote career where your accuracy, initiative, and systems mindset can truly shine.

Configure conversation triggers: SMS ? voice fallback, chat-to-human handoff, voicemail detection, transcript analysis. Set up call tracking, recording, and AI-driven sentiment tagging inside GHL. Experience deploying voice AI agents (Bland, Retell AI, Synthflow, or native GHL Voice AI). Proficiency with chat-based AI (OpenAI Assistant, Dialogflow, or GHL’s native AI chat features). Understanding of conversation design, prompt engineering, and fallback logic. API integration knowledge (REST, webhooks, JSON) – connecting external AI tools to GHL. Bonus: Experience with Twilio, Zapier/Make, CRM data syncing, or call analytics. Nice-to-Have: Prior agency experience managing GHL sub-accounts. Knowledge of NLP or LLM fine-tuning. Experience with compliance (TCPA, consent recording, opt-outs). How to Apply: Send the following to alanc@galactictiles.com Brief intro + link to portfolio or past GHL builds. A short Loom recording (optional) showing a GHL AI voice or chat integration you’ve built.

last_week_candidates.full_description: Location: Remote (Philippines) Employment Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor Salary: $900 to $1,200 USD/month (Depending on Experience) Help Build the Operating System of a Modern Accounting Firm Insight Advantage Group is a fast-growing U.S.-based outsourced accounting and Fractional CFO firm serving businesses across the United States. We're looking for someone who wants to help build the systems that allow our company to scale. This is not an Executive Assistant position. This is not a Virtual Assistant position. last_week_candidates.summary: Job Description We are building a multi-brand business operating system (OS) using Lovable.dev and Supabase. Our platforms are already structured. We are looking for a senior web developer to help complete, stabilize, and polish existing systems—not rebuild...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Job Description We are building a multi-brand business operating system (OS) using Lovable.dev and Supabase. Our platforms are already structured. We are looking for a senior web developer to help complete, stabilize, and polish existing systems—not rebuild them. This is a long-term role focused on execution, reliability, and finishing work properly. Phase 1 focus: GasMask (Additional platforms follow after GasMask is stable.) What You Will Be Working On Your job is to take already-built systems and help move them from “almost done” to fully complete and stable. You will work floor by floor, page by page, including: • Completing unfinished pages and flows • Fixing data fetch and rendering issues • Finalizing CRM functionality (stores, contacts, notes, products) • Ensuring all pages work on desktop and mobile • Cleaning up UI and unfinished states • Making sure nothing breaks after changes Platforms include: GasMask (first priority) Unforgettable Times TopTier Experience Playboxxx Core OS tools How Work Is Organized (Important) We use a floor-by-floor checklist system. Each “floor” (module) contains multiple pages. A floor is not complete until every page passes QA on desktop and mobile. If something fails QA, the task is not considered done. This role requires discipline and attention to detail. Required Skills (Non-Negotiable) • Strong hands-on experience with Lovable.dev • Practical experience with Supabase (tables, relationships, CRUD) • Ability to debug issues like: Blank pages “Failed to fetch” errors Data not showing • Experience completing and polishing existing platforms • Comfortable following structured task lists • Strong attention to detail • Ability to test your own work before marking tasks complete This role is not for beginners. Communication & Availability • Must be reachable via WhatsApp • Able to provide regular progress updates • Comfortable working independently with clear instructions WhatsApp communication is required. Compensation ?45,000 – ?65,000 per month (approximately $800 – $1,100 USD) Pay depends on experience, speed, and reliability. There is room for growth as more platforms are completed. Work Setup • Long-term role • Stable, ongoing workload • Clear priorities • No guessing, no chaos • You are paid for completion and stability How to Apply Please include: Your experience with Lovable.dev Your experience with Supabase Examples of platforms or systems you’ve worked on Your WhatsApp number ?? Applications without a WhatsApp number will not be considered. Who This Role Is NOT For • Beginners or trainees • Developers who prefer rebuilding instead of finishing • Developers who don’t test their own work • Anyone uncomfortable working inside existing systems Final Note (Sets the Tone) We value: • Reliability • Clean execution • Systems that stay stable

last_week_candidates.full_description: Job Overview: We are a growing hospitality investment and management company operating a portfolio of boutique and branded hotels across Arizona and California. We’re hiring a Remote Hotel Operations & Revenue Manager who can serve as a strategic partner in overseeing hotel operations, driving revenue, and directly supporting the company president (me) in executing key projects and daily priorities. This role requires someone with hands-on revenue management experience and a proactive, operational mindset. You'll help track performance, lead process improvement, manage action items, and support follow-through across multiple hotels. Comfort with using AI tools, managing task systems, and joining meetings or reviewing meeting to summarize outcomes is a must. This is a long-term remote role with high exposure, varied responsibilities, and the potential to grow alongside our company. Key Responsibilities: Revenue & Performance Management • Oversee room pricing, inventory, and distribution strategy across properties • Analyze occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, and forecasting data; recommend improvements • Audit OTA listings, booking engine setups, and rate parity regularly • Collaborate with presodent to implement pricing, promotion, and channel strategies Operational Oversight & Project Management • Track and support key hotel operations projects, initiatives, and CapEx plans • Support the President to ensure execution of SOPs and operational consistency across the hotel portfolio. Assist in creating SOPs when and where needed. • Identify inefficiencies and suggest operational improvements using AI and automation tools • Assist in preparing & reviewing daily/monthly reports for each hotel. Executive Support (Support for Owner/President) • Join internal and external meetings to take notes, summarize key decisions, and draft follow-ups • Maintain and update a task/project dashboard for hotel operations and executive priorities • Assist in scheduling, email follow-ups, and light research tasks • Prepare quarterly investor business recap for each hotel. • Leverage tools like ChatGPT, Notion, Trello, or AI agents to improve workflows and save time Ideal Candidate Will Have: • At least 2 years of hotel revenue management experience • Background in supporting operations for U.S.-based hotels or hospitality companies • Strong analytical and communication skills • Proactive, self-motivated, and detail-oriented approach • Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, task/project tools (e.g. Trello, Asana, Notion), and PMS systems (e.g. Cloudbeds, HotelKey, ChoiceAdvantage, SynXis, etc.) • Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Otter.ai, Zapier, or similar platforms • Fluent English (spoken and written); Spanish is a plus • Availability to work partially or fully during U.S. business hours How to Apply If you're excited about supporting high-level hotel operations while working closely with an experienced hospitality investor & entrepreneur, we’d love to hear from you. Please email your resume and a tailored cover letter, and include answers to the following questions to be considered: 1. How many years of experience do you have in hotel revenue management? 2. Have you worked with U.S.-based hotel companies? If yes, please describe your role and the types of properties you supported. 3. What AI tools or automation platforms (e.g. ChatGPT, Otter, Zapier, Notion) have you used, and how would you rate your proficiency on a scale of 1–5 (5 being expert)? 4. Have you provided executive-level support before (e.g. meeting notes, task tracking, project coordination)? Briefly share an actual example. We’re looking for someone proactive, tech-savvy, and ready to become an essential partner in daily operations. Apply today and join a fast-paced, forward-thinking team that values innovation, efficiency, and execution. Compensation & Benefits • Monthly Salary: $1,000 – $2,000 USD (based on experience and skillset) • Performance-based bonuses available every 6-months • Fully remote position with flexible hours (must overlap with U.S. business hours) • Opportunity to work closely with a U.S.-based hospitality executive and gain deep insight into hotel investment and operations • Long-term role with growth potential and increasing responsibility over time • Tools and training provided to support efficiency, automation, and workflow optimization We value initiative, clarity, and innovation—and we’re looking for someone ready to grow with us.

last_week_candidates.summary: BACKEND-FIRST WORDPRESS DEVELOPER REQUIRED — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING This is not a basic Elementor design role. We are looking for a highly skilled WordPress developer with strong backend development, troubleshooting, custom PHP, webhook integration...
last_week_candidates.full_description: BACKEND-FIRST WORDPRESS DEVELOPER REQUIRED — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING This is not a basic Elementor design role. We are looking for a highly skilled WordPress developer with strong backend development, troubleshooting, custom PHP, webhook integration, email configuration, and custom integration experience. Backend experience is the most critical need for this role. However, you must also have strong front-end skills and be able to accurately build modern, responsive, high-end websites from provided mockups and design direction. If you mostly depend on plugins, templates, WP Forms, Contact Form 7, or drag-and-drop tools to build functionality, this is not the right role for you. You must be able to work with custom PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, WPCode Snippets, custom forms, webhooks, WP SMTP, email configuration, Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, booking plugins, responsive layouts, custom CSS, and backend WordPress troubleshooting. A critical part of this role will involve building, connecting, and troubleshooting webhooks, form submissions, automated email workflows, SMTP issues, payment notifications, booking notifications, and other backend communication between WordPress and third-party tools. You must also be able to take provided mockups and build clean, polished, mobile-responsive pages with strong attention to layout, spacing, typography, responsiveness, and visual accuracy. We need someone who can fix technical problems, resolve plugin conflicts, troubleshoot broken functionality, test integrations, and make the website work properly without needing constant step-by-step instructions. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY if you cannot confidently handle backend WordPress development, PHP troubleshooting, webhooks, email configuration, custom integrations, and clean front-end execution. ABOUT THE ROLE We are looking for a backend-first WordPress developer who can also execute high-quality front-end website builds. Our websites include custom integrations and custom applications using PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, CSS, WordPress functionality, webhooks, third-party tools, custom forms, email systems, booking systems, payment integrations, WooCommerce, responsive layouts, and performance optimization. This role is not for someone who only builds pages in Elementor or installs templates. We need someone who can build, customize, troubleshoot, and support modern WordPress websites that require backend thinking, custom code, webhook logic, email configuration, front-end accuracy, and real issue resolution. We build our websites using WordPress, Elementor Pro, WPCode Snippets, custom PHP, JavaScript, AJAX, CSS, webhooks, and custom integrations. We do not use templates. We will provide mockups and design direction. You must be able to execute those mockups accurately on the front end while also making sure the backend functionality works properly. Please review these websites before applying: 100bmod.org organizedmovements.com If you cannot support, troubleshoot, and build websites at this level, please do not apply. CRITICAL REQUIREMENT The most important requirement for this role is backend WordPress experience. Again, this is not just an Elementor design role. This is a backend-focused WordPress role for someone who can troubleshoot, code, integrate, configure, and resolve technical problems independently. PHP, webhooks, custom integrations, and email configuration are critical needs for this role. You must be able to troubleshoot and resolve issues related to: Custom PHP functionality Webhook setup and troubleshooting Webhook-based form submissions Webhook notifications and automation AJAX and JavaScript functionality Custom form submissions WP SMTP and email delivery Email configuration and deliverability issues Automated email notifications Booking confirmation emails Payment notification emails Stripe webhook/payment notifications Mailchimp integration and automation WooCommerce setup and troubleshooting WooCommerce email issues Booking plugin setup and troubleshooting Plugin conflicts Broken site functionality WordPress performance issues Mobile and browser-specific issues Backend errors Database or configuration-related issues Custom WordPress workflows Custom integrations that require code beyond basic plugin setup We are especially looking for someone who can create and troubleshoot custom forms using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, webhooks, and proper email configuration. We are not looking for someone who only knows WP Forms, Contact Form 7, or basic drag-and-drop form plugins. Plugins may be part of the workflow, but you must know how to troubleshoot them, customize them, connect them properly, configure email delivery, and fix issues when they do not work as expected. FRONT-END REQUIREMENT Backend experience is the priority, but strong front-end development is also required. You must be able to take provided mockups, references, or design direction and build the website accurately in WordPress. You should have a strong eye for: Layout Spacing Typography Responsiveness Mobile presentation Visual hierarchy Clean front-end execution Modern luxury website design Animation and interactive effects Custom CSS Cross-browser consistency We do not need someone who only makes pages look nice. We need someone who can make the website look good and function correctly. REQUIRED SKILLS Strong WordPress backend development experience Custom PHP development Webhook integration Webhook troubleshooting Email configuration WP SMTP / email delivery troubleshooting JavaScript AJAX HTML5 CSS3 Custom CSS Elementor / Elementor Pro WPCode Snippets Custom form integrations Custom email notifications WooCommerce integration WooCommerce email troubleshooting Stripe integration Stripe webhook troubleshooting Mailchimp integration Booking plugins such as Amelia Booking notification setup and troubleshooting Events calendar plugins Advanced Custom Fields / ACF Custom WordPress functionality Dynamic content development Plugin conflict troubleshooting Backend issue resolution WordPress maintenance and troubleshooting Website performance optimization Speed optimization Responsive web development Mobile optimization Cross-browser testing Mockup-to-website development Modern front-end development SEO best practices Google Analytics integration Google Search Console setup WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING Building custom WordPress websites using Elementor Pro and custom code Creating custom forms using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, and webhooks Setting up and troubleshooting WP SMTP and email delivery Configuring and troubleshooting automated website emails Building and troubleshooting webhook-based workflows Setting up and troubleshooting booking plugins such as Amelia Integrating Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, and other tools Troubleshooting Stripe webhooks, payment notifications, and checkout issues Troubleshooting WooCommerce emails and backend functionality Writing and modifying PHP, CSS, JavaScript, and AJAX Creating custom functionality through WPCode Snippets or theme-level code Troubleshooting plugin conflicts and backend errors Fixing broken forms, checkout issues, email issues, booking issues, and webhook issues Fixing custom functionality when plugins do not work correctly Testing forms, payments, bookings, emails, webhooks, and integrations before submitting work Converting mockups into fully responsive WordPress websites Building polished front-end layouts with clean spacing, typography, and mobile responsiveness Optimizing websites for speed, performance, mobile, and SEO Maintaining and improving existing client websites WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR This role is not for someone who only knows Elementor design. This role is not for someone who only installs plugins and templates. This role is not for someone who depends on plugins for every feature. This role is not for someone who cannot troubleshoot backend issues. This role is not for someone who only uses WP Forms or Contact Form 7. This role is not for someone who cannot write or understand PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, and webhook logic. This role is not for someone who cannot configure or troubleshoot email delivery issues. This role is not for someone who cannot build responsive front-end layouts from mockups. This role is not for someone who ignores spacing, mobile layout, typography, or visual polish. This role is not for someone who disappears, misses deadlines, or needs constant follow-up. This role is not for someone who says “it should work” without testing and resolving the issue. This role is not for someone who cannot take ownership of technical problems. WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR This role is for someone who understands how WordPress works beyond the page builder. You should be comfortable reviewing errors, testing functionality, identifying plugin conflicts, fixing custom code, configuring SMTP, troubleshooting email delivery, building webhook integrations, improving performance, and making sure every part of the website works correctly. You should also be comfortable building clean, modern, responsive front-end layouts that match provided mockups and design direction. You must be able to work independently, communicate clearly, meet deadlines, and take ownership of technical issues until they are resolved. We need someone who can think through problems, not someone who waits for step-by-step instructions for every issue. You may use Codex or AI coding tools to assist with coding, but you must understand the code, test it properly, and be able to fix problems yourself. TO APPLY Please send the following: 1. Your best WordPress websites that include custom functionality 2. Examples of backend WordPress issues you have solved 3. Examples of custom forms you have built using PHP, AJAX, JavaScript, or webhooks 4. Examples of webhook integrations you have built or troubleshot 5. Examples of WP SMTP, email configuration, or email deliverability issues you have resolved 6. Examples of Stripe, Mailchimp, WooCommerce, or booking plugin work 7. last_week_candidates.full_description: Job Title Full-Time AI Builder for Trades Software Startup (ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier) Job Type Full-time, long-term remote role. Philippines only. Compensation PHP 50,000–70,000/month, depending on experience and fit, plus performance-based bonuses as the business grows. This role starts with a 60-day trial period. Compensation and responsibilities can grow if the fit is strong. Working Hours Full-time. We are flexible on the exact schedule, but you must be able to work 8 hours somewhere between 6:00 AM and 6:00 PM Pacific Time. Job Description We are starting a new software business focused on building practical AI-powered tools for trades businesses. The business is early-stage and pre-revenue, so we are looking for someone resourceful, technical, honest, and comfortable building from the ground up. This is not a basic VA role and not a pure coding role. We are looking for a full-time AI builder and support lead who can use tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Zapier to create useful workflows, test them carefully, document them clearly, and eventually help support customers. You do not need to be a software developer. Coding is not required. But you must be comfortable with AI tools, automations, troubleshooting, and learning new systems quickly. What You’ll Do Build AI workflows and automations using tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Zapier, Google Workspace, and similar tools. Turn messy business problems into simple workflows. Test automations carefully and make sure they actually work. Write prompts and improve AI outputs. Document systems, SOPs, and customer instructions. Help troubleshoot customer issues once we launch. Create short Loom-style walkthrough videos when helpful. Work directly with the founders to build and improve the business. Required Skills Required: - Strong English writing and communication. - Strong experience using ChatGPT and/or Claude. - Familiarity with Zapier. - Comfortable learning new AI tools and automation tools. - Strong problem-solving ability. - Detail-oriented testing mindset. - Ability to explain technical issues simply. - Reliable internet and reliable work habits. - Comfortable working in an early-stage startup. Nice to have: - Make, n8n, Airtable, Notion, Google Sheets, or CRM automation experience. - Experience with customer support. - Experience making Loom videos or help docs. - Experience with trades, home service, construction, or contractor businesses. - Basic API/webhook familiarity. Who This Role Is For You should apply if: - You enjoy building useful AI workflows, not just talking about AI. - You like figuring things out. - You are organized and careful. - You can work independently without needing every step explained. - You are comfortable supporting customers and troubleshooting issues. - You want a long-term full-time role where you can grow with the business. You should not apply if: - You only want basic VA tasks. - You have only used AI casually. - You need every task explained step-by-step. - You do not like troubleshooting. - You are not comfortable with customer support. Application Instructions To apply, complete this application form: mission.revivepaintingang.uk/apply-ai-builder Please include a Loom/video link showing an AI automation or workflow you have built. If you do not have one already, record a short walkthrough of your most impressive AI/automation project. Important: We will only review candidates who complete the form. Please do not send a generic copy/paste message. In your OLJ message, include the phrase: TRADES AI BUILDER so we know you read the full post.

last_week_candidates.full_description: The Opportunity Search is splitting in two. Half your future visitors will find you through Google. The other half will ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google's AI Overviews *"what's the best rehab that allows..."* — and get an answer with three sources cited. We need one person who can win both. We operate a portfolio of addiction treatment and behavioral health web properties, including a directory platform built on a modern stack (Next.js / Vercel / Supabase). Organic discovery is our primary growth channel, and we want to be early and aggressive on AI search visibility while competitors are still only thinking about Google. What You'll Own Traditional SEO (~60%) - Keyword strategy, on-page optimization, and content direction for YMYL health topics - Technical SEO on Next.js: rendering strategy, canonicals, Core Web Vitals, internal linking, crawlability - Structured data implementation and expansion (schema.org: MedicalClinic, FAQPage, MedicalOrganization) - Programmatic SEO for state/city directory pages — scaled templates that don't read as thin content - Migration support: an active WordPress ? Next.js rebuild with URL preservation and redirect mapping - Competitive gap analysis against established treatment directories AI Search / GEO (~40%) - Get our properties **cited as sources** in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews for treatment-related queries - Structure content for answer extraction: direct-answer formatting, question-based headings, definitive claims with data, citable statistics - Entity and brand optimization: consistent entity signals, Wikipedia/Wikidata-adjacent presence, third-party mentions AI models learn from - Implement and maintain llms.txt and monitor AI crawler access (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) — deciding what to allow and how to structure it - Track AI visibility: monitor which queries surface us in AI answers, benchmark against competitors, and build a repeatable measurement process (this field has no Search Console — you'll help invent our instrumentation) - Stay current: this discipline changes monthly, and we expect you to bring us the changes before we read about them You're a Fit If You - Have 3+ years of SEO results in competitive or YMYL niches (health, legal, finance) — with at least one win you can walk us through in detail - Have *actually done* AI search optimization — you can show a page or brand you got cited in AI answers, or a documented experiment, not just articles you've read about GEO - Are technical enough to work directly with a Next.js codebase conversation: you don't write the code, but you can spec exactly what the code should do - Understand E-E-A-T and what it takes for health content to survive core updates - Are comfortable in a scrappy, founder-led environment: no committees, fast decisions, your recommendations ship **Nice to have:** behavioral health or healthcare marketing background, familiarity with treatment-marketing compliance (LegitScript, patient-brokering laws), experience with AI content workflows, basic SQL/Supabase. description

last_week_candidates.title: AI Data Engineer - Data Extraction
last_week_candidates.summary: Specification-Driven Extraction Engineering: Design and maintain declarative extraction specifications—using Pydantic models, JSON schemas, or domain-specific languages—that describe exactly which fields to capture, their types, and validation rules...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Specification-Driven Extraction Engineering: Design and maintain declarative extraction specifications—using Pydantic models, JSON schemas, or domain-specific languages—that describe exactly which fields to capture, their types, and validation rules. Implement pipelines that translate these specifications into executable extraction plans, leveraging both classical (Scrapy, Playwright) and AI-augmented (LLM-based semantic parsing) backends. Build reusable specification libraries for recurring data types (product prices, tariff codes, regulatory texts) to accelerate onboarding of new sources. Design and implement autonomous data extraction agents that can make decisions about source selection, retry logic, and parsing strategies Autonomous & Self-Healing Systems: Deploy self-healing spiders that automatically detect website layout changes and repair themselves using Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers (e.g., Scrapy MCP Server, Playwright MCP). Integrate semantic extraction (Scrapy-LLM, custom LLM pipelines) to eliminate selector brittleness—spiders rely on field descriptions, not fragile XPaths. Hands-on experience building AI agents and orchestration systems. Orchestrate complex, multi-step browsing workflows with agentic frameworks (BMAD/TEA, AutoGPT-like agents) that reason about page state, adapt to anti-bot measures, and correct their own behaviour in real time. Platform Thinking & Reusability: Move beyond one-off scrapers: build a component-based extraction platform where selectors, login handlers, and pagination logic are shared, versioned, and tested. Implement monitoring, alerting, and automatic rollback for failed extraction runs. Champion ethical crawling by design—rate limiting, robots.txt respect, and compliance with GDPR/CCPA are built into the specification layer, not retrofitted. Collaboration & Continuous Innovation: Partner with data scientists and domain experts to refine extraction specifications for complex, unstructured domains (e.g., legal texts, tariff classifications). Evaluate and pilot emerging tools to push automation coverage beyond 90%. Document and evangelise specification-driven best practices across the engineering organisation. Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science 3+ years of experience in web scraping or data extraction Required Skills: Proficiency with Python Experience with specification-Driven Extraction Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, AutoGen Hands?on use of Scrapy?LLM, Scrapy MCP Server, or similar systems that decouple field definitions from page structure Familiarity with frameworks that give LLMs browser control (Playwright + MCP, BMAD/TEA) to handle complex, non?deterministic crawling tasks. Classical Scraping Fundamentals Data Validation & Storage – Ability to define validation rules within specifications and land clean data into SQL/NoSQL databases or data lake Basic API integration and authentication flows. HTTP, DOM, XPath, CSS. Nice to Haves: Contributions to open-source scraping or AI-automation projects. Contributions to open-source scraping or AI-automation projects. Familiarity with data privacy engineering (GDPR, CCPA) baked into specification design. DevOps light – Docker, CI/CD for testing extraction specifications.

last_week_candidates.summary: WHO WE ARE We are a dual-pillar business operating at the intersection of real estate acquisition and credit-driven business funding. On the real estate side, we specialize in creative financing — subject-to deals, cold outreach on vacant, pre-foreclosure...
last_week_candidates.full_description: WHO WE ARE We are a dual-pillar business operating at the intersection of real estate acquisition and credit-driven business funding. On the real estate side, we specialize in creative financing — subject-to deals, cold outreach on vacant, pre-foreclosure, and tax-lien properties. On the funding side, we help small business owners clean up their credit profiles and unlock $50K–$150K+ in business capital to scale through hiring, advertising, and infrastructure. Both businesses are growing fast. We are not looking for someone to maintain the status quo. We are building the infrastructure to scale, and we need the right operator at the center of it. THE ROLE This is not a coordinator position. You are the operational backbone of two businesses. You will manage talent, oversee execution, own systems, and ensure both pillars perform at a high level — simultaneously. You will be the primary point of contact between leadership and the team. Decisions that used to wait will now have a home with you. If you are someone who needs to be told what to do every step of the way, this is not the role for you. If you thrive in ambiguity, move fast, build structure where there is none, and hold people accountable to outcomes — read on. WHAT YOU WILL OWN CREDIT REPAIR OPERATIONS • Oversee day-to-day credit repair operations and client fulfillment from onboarding through resolutionEnsure effective use of compliant credit repair methods and workflows across all active client casesManage CRM systems for client onboarding, dispute tracking, and client communicationMonitor KPIs including turnaround times, client progress, and retention ratesImprove and document SOPs to ensure consistency and scalability as the client base grows MARKETING OPERATIONS • Coordinate and oversee marketing execution across all social media platformsEnsure production of high-quality, attention-grabbing short-form content — Reels, clips, viral editsOversee workflows for content batching, editing standards, transitions, hooks, captions, and CTAsAlign all marketing output with lead generation goals, brand standards, and compliance requirementsServe as the operational bridge between marketing content and sales funnels REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS & VA MANAGEMENT • Manage and communicate with real estate virtual assistants to ensure daily output and accountabilityEnsure accurate property research and market targeting for subject-to and creative finance opportunitiesOversee CRM workflows for real estate lead intake, tracking, and follow-upCoordinate use of tools including Go High Level and Lead Shepherd to manage pipeline activityAct as liaison between leadership and VA teams to maintain performance standards TALENT SOURCING & TEAM BUILDING • You are the eyes and ears of this organization when it comes to hiring — across every pillar, every role, every verticalActively source, vet, and recruit candidates for open roles across the credit repair arm, real estate arm, and marketing and media arm — without waiting to be directedOwn the full hiring pipeline: job post creation, application review, candidate screening, interviews, and final recommendations to leadershipSource talent through OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, and any other platform necessary to find the right people at the right timeIdentify gaps in the team before they become problems — if a role needs to be filled, you are expected to have candidates in the pipeline proactivelyOnboard all new hires with proper documentation, SOPs, access, and expectations from day oneMonitor new hire performance through a structured probation period and make retention or replacement recommendations accordinglyMaintain a running roster of vetted talent that can be activated when a role opens — the business does not stop for vacancies SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION • Identify opportunities to automate repetitive tasks and streamline workflows using AI and CRM toolsImplement and optimize CRM automations, pipelines, tagging systems, and reporting dashboardsContinuously improve internal systems and document SOPs as the business scalesServe as the primary point of contact between the founder and the entire team REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS CREDIT REPAIR — EXTENSIVE KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED • Deep, hands-on knowledge of credit repair processes — dispute methods, Metro 2 compliance, goodwill letters, rapid rescore strategies, and credit bureau protocolsAbility to audit a client's credit profile and identify the correct course of action without guidanceExperience managing active credit repair caseloads and ensuring clients move through the pipeline efficientlyIf you cannot perform the work yourself, you must be capable of identifying, hiring, and managing the talent who can — no exceptions MEDIA & MARKETING — EXTENSIVE KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED • Extensive experience with short-form content creation and strategy — Reels, TikTok-style edits, viral clips, memes, and carousel postsProficiency with CapCut Pro for video editing — transitions, hooks, captions, sound design, and platform-optimized outputStrong understanding of content batching, scheduling, and maintaining consistent brand voice across platformsKnowledge of what drives engagement, reach, and conversion in the credit repair and real estate nichesAbility to oversee and quality-control a content creator or media VA — and step in to execute if that role is vacantExperience with Meta Ads Manager or paid social campaigns is a strong plus REAL ESTATE — VAST EXPERIENCE REQUIRED • Extensive real estate operations experience — creative financing, subject-to acquisitions, seller finance, and distressed property targetingHands-on experience with multiple real estate platforms and lead generation portals (see tools list below)Ability to manage and direct VA cold callers, skip tracers, and lead managers toward daily performance targetsStrong understanding of how to identify, qualify, and track motivated seller leads through the full pipelineIf a tool or strategy can improve team performance and pipeline output, you are expected to know it or find it OPERATIONS & LEADERSHIP • Proven ability to hire, vet, onboard, and manage remote talent across multiple departmentsIf a role is unfilled, the responsibility does not disappear — it falls on you until the right person is in placeStrong SOP development skills — you document everything so the business is never dependent on one personHigh-level proficiency with CRM and automation platforms — Go High Level strongly preferredA-player standard: you own every outcome under your oversight, you hold your team accountable, and you deliver results — not reasons WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE • Credit repair clients move smoothly through the system with clear tracking and minimal bottlenecksMarketing content is consistent, high-quality, and aligned with growth goals across both brandsReal estate VAs operate with clear direction, accurate data, and strong accountability to daily targetsEvery open role has qualified candidates in the pipeline before leadership has to askNew hires are onboarded cleanly, perform to standard, and integrate without disrupting operationsSystems are documented, automated, and scalable — not dependent on any single personLeadership is freed from daily operational oversight and focused entirely on growth PLATFORM & TOOL PROFICIENCY Extensive experience across multiple platforms is required. You must be proficient in at least 2–3 per category. The more you bring, the stronger your application. CRM & AUTOMATION Go High Level* Podio HubSpot ClickUp / Asana / Trello Zapier / Make REAL ESTATE PORTALS & LEAD GEN Lead Shepherd* PropStream* Smarter Contact / SmrtPhone* REI Reply Batch Leads / Batch Dialer DealMachine Skip Genie CONTENT & MEDIA CapCut Pro* Meta Ads Manager Canva Pro Later / Buffer / Metricool Loom / Zoom GENERAL OPERATIONS Google Workspace Slack Notion ChatGPT / AI Tools Asterisk = considered essential. All others strengthen your application. COMPENSATION $100 – $130 USD / Month · Part-Time or Full-Time · Remote This role is flexible — part-time or full-time arrangements are both on the table depending on your availability and the needs of the business. What matters most is that the team gets built right and results are delivered consistently. The right candidate who demonstrates value will have room to grow with us long-term. HOW TO APPLY Do not send a generic application. We will not respond to them. In your application, tell us: (1) which of the two business verticals you have the deepest experience in, (2) the tools you are proficient in and a specific result you drove using them, and (3) describe a time you managed a team remotely and how you held them accountable. Applications that skip these will be disqualified. We move fast. If you are right for this role, you will know within days.
