last_week_candidates.full_description: EverMint Media is a growing social media marketing agency helping businesses build their brand, generate leads, and grow through strategic social media marketing. We work with founders, service-based businesses, and B2B companies across various industries, helping them create meaningful content, build authority, and attract new clients online. We're looking for a tech-savvy, proactive person to coordinate our technology, AI tools, and integrations — making sure everything behind the scenes runs smoothly. Role Overview This is a flexible, part-time role that combines AI and automation work with general technical operations. This role is perfect for someone who enjoys connecting tools, automating repetitive work, and quietly making everything run better. You'll be the go-to person for anything technical in the business. You don't need to be a software developer. What matters most is that you're hands-on with modern tools, a confident troubleshooter, and comfortable taking ownership of systems while keeping things documented and organised. A key part of this role involves setting up and maintaining AI tools and automations, connecting our platforms so data flows correctly between them, resolving technical issues quickly, and helping the team work more efficiently through smart use of technology. Key Responsibilities AI & Automation Set up, manage, and improve AI tools and workflows (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude, content and image tools) Build and maintain automations using platforms like Zapier, Make, or n8n Create prompts, templates, and simple internal guides for the team Research new AI tools and recommend what's worth adopting Integrations & Systems Connect and maintain our software stack (CRM, email, scheduling, project management, and social media tools) Make sure data flows correctly between platforms Manage accounts, access, and permissions securely Keep systems documentation and SOPs up to date Technical Operations Monitor that automations and integrations are running smoothly Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues for the team Support tracking, reporting, and data hygiene across our tools Assist with ad hoc technical projects as needed Who We're Looking For Hands-on experience with AI tools and automation platforms (Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar) Comfortable with APIs, webhooks, and connecting tools together Strong problem-solver who can troubleshoot independently Excellent written English — able to explain technical things in plain language Highly organised, dependable, and careful with access and data Comfortable following systems and processes while looking for ways to improve them Able to work independently without constant supervision Proactive and resourceful — spots issues before they become problems Positive attitude and willingness to learn Availability Requirements This role requires someone who can check in, respond to messages, and resolve any issues, with availability that overlaps with UK (London) working hours. Occasionally, urgent technical issues may need a faster response. Why Join Us? Flexible remote work Approximately 10–15 hours per week Full training on our internal systems and processes Opportunity to grow with a growing marketing agency Varied, hands-on work with the latest AI tools Supportive and collaborative environment How to Apply AI-generated applications will not be considered, yes, even for an AI role. We are interested in your own thinking, communication style, and writing ability. last_week_candidates.full_description: # Operations & Systems Manager (Remote) ## Company Introduction Buckeye Illumination is a fast-growing outdoor lighting company based in Ohio, specializing in premium Christmas lighting, permanent architectural lighting, and exterior lighting solutions for residential and commercial properties. We're building more than a lighting company—we're building scalable systems and a world-class customer experience. As we continue to grow, we're looking for someone who enjoys creating order, improving processes, solving problems, and helping build the foundation of a business. This isn't a traditional Virtual Assistant role. You'll work directly with the owner to document systems, implement AI and automation, improve operations, and help build a company designed to scale. --- ## Key Duties & Responsibilities * Build and maintain the company's Operations Manual. * Create high-level process documentation for every department. * Write detailed Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs). * Develop employee training manuals and onboarding materials. * Build and maintain an organized company knowledge base. * Improve existing workflows and recommend new systems. * Assist with recruiting, onboarding, and training future team members. * Organize projects and ensure deadlines are met. * Research software, vendors, and operational improvements. * Implement AI tools and business automation where appropriate. * Manage CRM workflows and customer communication processes. * Track company KPIs and create management reports. * Coordinate projects with internal and external team members. * Take ownership of assigned projects from start to finish. --- ## Required Qualifications ### Required * 3+ years of Operations, Project Management, Executive Assistant, or Business Administration experience. * Excellent written and spoken English. * Strong organizational and time management skills. * Exceptional attention to detail. * Excellent problem-solving and critical-thinking ability. * Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously. * Experience creating SOPs and documenting business processes. * Comfortable learning new software quickly. * Reliable high-speed internet connection. * Professional home office environment. ### Preferred Software Experience * **GoHighLevel (HighLevel)** – CRM, pipelines, workflows, automations, AI integrations, calendars, forms, and customer communication. * **ClickUp** (preferred), Asana, or Monday.com. * **Slack** for team communication. * **Google Workspace** (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar). * **Microsoft Office**. * **ChatGPT** and other AI productivity tools. * **Zapier**, **Make**, or **n8n** automation platforms. ### Bonus Qualifications * Experience managing remote teams. * Experience implementing operational systems. * Experience with AI workflow development. * Process improvement or Lean operations experience. * Experience working with U.S.-based service businesses. --- ## Additional Information We're looking for someone who wants to grow with our company long-term. This role has the opportunity to become a leadership position as we continue to expand. We're not looking for someone who simply completes tasks—we're looking for someone who enjoys building systems, solving problems, improving efficiency, and taking ownership. Our ideal candidate is proactive, organized, resourceful, and excited about using technology and AI to build a world-class operation. Hours are 9am-5pm EST hours will be a set 40hrs Mon-Fri. with additional hours as needed during peak season. Pay period is Biweekly rate will be based on final role and experience ranging from $1,200 to +$2,000 with performance bonuses. **To confirm you've read this posting, begin your application with the phrase "Built to Scale."** When applying, please include: * Your resume. * A brief introduction explaining why you're interested in this role. * Examples of SOPs, process documentation, operations manuals, or workflow improvements you've created (if available). * A short Loom video (2–5 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit. * Your experience with GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Slack, AI tools, and business automation. * Your expected hourly rate and your weekly availability.

In this unique position, a significant part of your initial focus will be pioneering our AI capabilities—specifically building and implementing a workflow using Claude AI (or similar tools) to efficiently translate Figma designs into WordPress Elementor websites. Alongside driving this AI initiative, you will take charge of structuring, developing, and maintaining complex custom WordPress websites from start to finish. Your Responsibilities: - AI Workflow Integration (New): Develop, test, and implement an automated or AI-assisted workflow (utilizing tools like Claude AI) to convert Figma designs directly into fully functional WordPress/Elementor layouts. - Development & Structuring: Build and customize advanced WordPress websites using Elementor, tailoring them to specific client needs. - Data Architecture: Set up and manage complex data structures using SCF/ACF fields and JetEngine. - E-commerce: Develop and maintain webshops using WooCommerce and Shopify. - Custom Coding: Utilize HTML, CSS, PHP and Liquid to write, modify, and optimize custom functionalities. What We’re Looking For: - AI & Prompt Engineering (New): Experience with (or a strong, demonstrable aptitude for) AI models like Claude AI or ChatGPT, specifically using them to accelerate coding or development workflows. - Design-to-Code Expertise (New): Solid understanding of Figma and how to logically break down design files for web implementation. - Core WordPress & Shopify Skills: Demonstrated experience in developing advanced WordPress websites with extensive, hands-on knowledge of Elementor, WooCommerce, Shopify theme builder. - Technical Proficiency: Deep understanding of data structuring (SCF/ACF, JetEngine) and proficiency in HTML, CSS, PHP and Liquid. - Portfolio: A portfolio featuring at least three complex WordPress websites/platforms you have built. - Experience: 5+ years of professional experience, with a solid understanding of performance optimization and SEO best practices. - Language: Fluent in English, both spoken and written. - Hosting Management (Bonus): Hands-on experience with website hosting (e.g., creating server environments, migrating/transferring websites, and troubleshooting hosting-related issues) is a strong plus. - Basic SEO (Bonus): Knowledge of basic Search Engine Optimization (SEO) principles and best practices is a plus. What You’ll Get: - A creative and flexible work atmosphere. - The chance to pioneer AI integration within our company and work on technically challenging projects. - Opportunities for personal growth, skill advancement, and taking on leadership within the team. - A salary between $500 and $1000, depending on your experience and abilities. (Note: as discussed, higher compensation is available for successfully leading the AI integration). - Potential for increased earnings based on performance and results. If you’re enthusiastic about merging AI with traditional development, structuring complex platforms, and taking ownership of your work, we’re excited to see your portfolio. To show you’ve read this job posting, please reply with the word “banana.” Let’s build something great together!

last_week_candidates.title: Virtual Operations Coordinator & Executive Assistant
last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: Sales Support Executive Assistance Medical Virtual Assistant
last_week_candidates.summary: This position requires working during U.S. Pacific business hours. Applicants must be comfortable working overnight Philippine time on a consistent schedule. Working Hours: Monday through Friday, approximately 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Time. Some flexibility...
last_week_candidates.full_description: This position requires working during U.S. Pacific business hours. Applicants must be comfortable working overnight Philippine time on a consistent schedule. Working Hours: Monday through Friday, approximately 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Time. Some flexibility may be required as the business grows. About Right at Home - Folsom Lake Right at Home - Folsom Lake is a locally owned, veteran-owned home care agency serving seniors and adults with disabilities throughout El Dorado Hills, Folsom, Granite Bay, Roseville, Rocklin, Orangevale, Citrus Heights, Loomis, and surrounding communities. Mission-First. Rooted in Service. We believe exceptional home care begins with exceptional people, disciplined systems, and outstanding customer service. We're building a modern healthcare company that leverages technology, automation, and AI to deliver an exceptional experience for our clients, caregivers, and referral partners. We're looking for someone who wants to help build something meaningful, not just complete tasks. This is a long-term position with significant opportunity for growth. Your Mission Become the operational hub of our growing healthcare company. Your mission is to ensure every inquiry receives an immediate or timely response, every referral is tracked, every process is organized, and every system continuously improves, allowing the founder to focus on serving clients, building referral relationships, and growing the business. You won't simply complete tasks. You'll own systems. You'll be trusted to identify opportunities, improve processes, and help build the operational foundation of a growing healthcare company. Primary Responsibilities Client Intake & Lead Management Monitor and respond to inbound opportunities, including: A Place for Mom (APFM) Caring.com Website inquiries Email inquiries Phone messages Google Business Profile inquiries Responsibilities include: Monitor inbound lead channels continuously during working hours. Prioritize immediate response to new client inquiries. Qualify prospective clients using established intake procedures. Schedule in-home assessments. Prepare digital intake documents before assessments. Maintain lead follow-up schedules. Track every inquiry from initial contact through conversion. Ensure no lead is ever forgotten. CRM & Sales Pipeline Management Own the accuracy and organization of our CRM. Responsibilities include: Maintain prospect and client records. Maintain accurate notes for every client, prospect, and referral source. Maintain the referral source database. Track lead sources and conversion rates. Update marketing contacts. Schedule follow-up reminders. Maintain referral relationship history. Monitor lead pipeline health. Ensure CRM accuracy at all times. Founder & Executive Support Help maximize the founder's effectiveness by managing operational details. Responsibilities include: Calendar management. Appointment coordination. Weekly planning. Marketing route planning. Email organization. Task management. Project coordination. Prepare agendas and digital meeting materials. Prepare weekly operational summaries and priority lists. Track action items and follow up on commitments. Referral Marketing Support Support our relationship marketing strategy by: Maintaining the referral CRM. Tracking facility visits and marketing activities. Logging referral interactions and follow-up tasks. Scheduling reminders for future visits. Updating referral contact information. Tracking referral source performance. Preparing weekly referral activity reports and marketing dashboards. Monitoring referral follow-up cadence. Marketing Operations Support our digital marketing efforts by: Manage the Google Business Profile. Maintain the company LinkedIn page. Schedule social media posts. Monitor website contact forms and online inquiries. Coordinate newsletters. Update website content. Create Canva graphics. Support local marketing campaigns. Reputation Management Coordinate Google review requests. Track review completion. Monitor online reputation. Escalate reviews requiring management attention. AI & Process Improvement We actively use AI throughout our business. Responsibilities include: Leverage ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI tools to improve productivity. Identify automation opportunities. Improve workflows. Document standard operating procedures. Build repeatable systems. Recommend operational improvements. Administrative Operations Maintain organized digital filing systems. Maintain SOP documentation. Create reports and dashboards. Update spreadsheets. Prepare weekly KPI reports. Identify process improvements. Help build scalable business systems. Required Qualifications: Excellent written English. Excellent spoken English. Outstanding organizational skills. Professional phone presence. Strong attention to detail. Excellent time management and prioritization skills. Reliable high-speed internet. Quiet home office. Strong computer skills. Self-starter with excellent judgment. High level of personal accountability. Comfortable learning new software quickly. Able to manage multiple priorities simultaneously. Preferred Experience: Executive Assistant Operations Coordinator Healthcare administration Home Care or Home Health CRM management Google Workspace Microsoft 365 Canva Project Management Social Media Management AI tools including ChatGPT and Claude Software You'll Use: Google Workspace Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, Word, Excel, SharePoint) WellSky Apploi QuickBooks CRM software LinkedIn Facebook Google Business Profile Canva ChatGPT Claude Our Operating Philosophy We believe technology should amplify people, not replace them. We use AI, automation, and well-designed systems to eliminate repetitive work so our team can focus on serving clients, supporting caregivers, and building meaningful relationships. We value ownership, initiative, continuous improvement, and clear communication. What Success Looks Like Success in this role means: APFM inquiries receive immediate attention. Client inquiries receive timely and professional responses. Every lead is tracked and followed through to completion. The CRM is always accurate and current. Referral marketing activities stay organized. Weekly KPI reports are delivered on time. Administrative systems become more efficient every month. Families, caregivers, referral partners, and employees receive professional communication that reflects our Mission-First culture. The founder spends time building relationships, not chasing administrative work. Key Performance Indicators: APFM response time Overall lead response time Assessment scheduling rate CRM accuracy Referral follow-up completion Calendar accuracy Marketing task completion Google review requests completed Weekly reporting accuracy Process improvements implemented Decision-Making Authority We value initiative. We expect team members to identify problems, recommend solutions, improve systems, and take ownership of their work. You'll be trusted to make sound decisions, communicate proactively, and continuously improve how we operate. What We're Looking For We're not looking for someone who simply follows instructions. We're looking for someone who enjoys building systems, creating order from complexity, and helping a growing healthcare company operate at a high level. If you love solving problems, improving processes, leveraging AI, and making a meaningful impact behind the scenes, we'd love to hear from you. Growth Opportunity This is not a typical virtual assistant position. As our company grows, this role has the opportunity to grow into a senior operations leadership position with increasing responsibility in business operations, technology, automation, project management, and strategic initiatives. We're looking for someone who wants to build a long-term career and grow alongside our company. To help us identify candidates who pay attention to detail, begin your application with the words "Mission First." Please also include: • A brief introduction about yourself. • A 2 to 3 minute video introducing yourself in English. • One example of a process or system you improved in a previous role. • A brief description of how you use AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude in your daily work.

last_week_candidates.title: AI Engineer - Hermes Agent
last_week_candidates.summary: Key Responsibilities: Agent Architecture & Development: Design and implement autonomous agent systems using frameworks using Hermes Agent. Build multi-agent collaboration patterns (e.g., orchestrator-workers, debate, hierarchical swarms). Implement agentic...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Key Responsibilities: Agent Architecture & Development: Design and implement autonomous agent systems using frameworks using Hermes Agent. Build multi-agent collaboration patterns (e.g., orchestrator-workers, debate, hierarchical swarms). Implement agentic memory systems (short-term, long-term, and episodic memory) using vector databases and semantic caching. Reasoning & Planning: Integrate advanced reasoning techniques: ReAct, Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT), and Plan-and-Solve. Develop agents capable of dynamic planning, error recovery, and replanning based on environmental feedback. Implement tool use (function calling) and API grounding for actions like database queries, API calls, RAG retrieval, and UI automation. Production & Evaluation: Build robust evaluation frameworks (agentic eval) to test for task completion, efficiency, and safety—not just lexical similarity. Instrument agents with tracing, observability, and logging (e.g., LangSmith, Arize, Weights & Biases). Optimize for latency, cost (token usage), and reliability in production. Integration & Tooling: Connect agents to internal and external systems: CRMs, databases, Slack, browsers, REST APIs, and code interpreters. Develop custom tools and sandboxed environments for agents to execute code or shell commands safely. Required Qualifications: Technical Skills: Programming: Expert in Python Strong understanding of prompt engineering, few-shot learning, and structured output generation (JSON mode, grammars). Reasoning Patterns: Proven experience implementing agentic patterns (ReAct, Reflexion, Toolformer) in production or complex prototypes. Memory & Retrieval: Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant) and RAG optimization (hybrid search, reranking). Orchestration: Familiarity with workflow engines (Temporal, Prefect, Airflow) for human-in-the-loop and durable execution. Observability: Experience monitoring LLM applications (prompt traces, token usage, drift). Model Context Protocol: Built agents that use MCP for multi-step research, code analysis, or data engineering tasks. Agentic Framework : Practical experience with Hermes Agent Education & Experience: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, AI, or related discipline 3 years in software engineering / ML engineering. Experience building production-grade agentic systems (not just demos or chatbots). Strong understanding of LLM limitations: hallucinations, jailbreaks, prompt injection, and failure modes. Good understanding of MCP discovery patterns and context negotiation. Strong knowledge of context management in LLM applications: prompt caching, sliding window, semantic retrieval, MCP resource lifecycle.

last_week_candidates.title: Automation & Funnel Specialist — Healing With Haile
last_week_candidates.summary: About the Role I run a growing wellness and coaching brand called Healing With Haile. I'm a solo founder and I need someone to build and run the automation backend that connects my content, my email list, and my offers so leads actually turn into paying...
last_week_candidates.full_description: About the Role I run a growing wellness and coaching brand called Healing With Haile. I'm a solo founder and I need someone to build and run the automation backend that connects my content, my email list, and my offers so leads actually turn into paying clients instead of falling through the cracks. This is hands on technical work. You'll be connecting platforms, building workflows, and keeping things running without me having to manage it day to day. What You'll Build You'll start with one project and expand based on performance. Projects on the table include: A Stan Store to MailerLite automation so new leads get tagged correctly and dropped into the right welcome sequence automatically. A ManyChat to email bridge so DM keyword triggers (lead magnet deliveries, waitlist signups) sync cleanly into MailerLite without manual exporting. Subscriber tagging and segmentation inside MailerLite so the right offer emails reach the right people at the right stage. A full launch automation system for a digital course launching in August, including waitlist delivery, early bird pricing, launch sequence emails, and post purchase onboarding. A content repurposing workflow that takes video transcripts and turns them into email and caption drafts automatically. Platforms You Must Know Zapier, including multi step Zaps, filters, paths, and webhooks. This is our primary automation engine, so you need real working experience here, not just the free tier basics. MailerLite, tagging, automations, subscriber management, API. ManyChat, keyword triggers, broadcast flows, contact management. Webhooks and REST APIs, you need to be comfortable connecting tools that don't have native Zapier integrations. AI tools in workflows, OpenAI API for transcription and content generation, used inside automations rather than just chatting with ChatGPT. Platforms You'll Learn On the Job Stan Store, our storefront and checkout platform. Canva and Trello, for asset handoffs and project tracking with the rest of the team. Google Sheets and Google Drive. Who I'm Looking For You've built real automations that solved real business problems, not just tutorials or test projects. You can explain what you built in plain language, no jargon walls. You communicate proactively. If something breaks, you tell me before I notice. You're comfortable working independently and async, this is a Philippines remote role with a solo US based founder, so ownership matters more than hours logged. You document what you build so it can be handed off or reused. You understand task based pricing well enough to build efficiently, not in a way that burns through the monthly task budget unnecessarily. How This Works We start with one test project at a flat fee. If the build is clean, communication is clear, and it actually does what it's supposed to do, we move to a full build and an ongoing retainer. How to Apply Send me: A short intro Your experience with Zapier specifically, including multi step Zaps and webhooks One real automation you've built, what it did, what tools you used, what problem it solved Your experience using AI tools (OpenAI, Whisper, ChatGPT) inside a workflow, not just as a chatbot Your expected monthly rate or hourly rate One thing about you I might not think to ask Skills test question: A lead fills out a form, books a call, then no shows. Walk me through how you'd automate the follow up so they don't just disappear from the funnel. Applications without a specific example and an answer to the skills question will not be considered.

last_week_candidates.title: Solutions Support Specialist (monday.com & Make.com)
last_week_candidates.summary: Role Overview We manage systems, automations and business process for 24+ clients. We are seeking a Solutions Support Specialist who can act as the primary interface for client requests, provide training and support for our clients., and use AI tools to build...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Role Overview We manage systems, automations and business process for 24+ clients. We are seeking a Solutions Support Specialist who can act as the primary interface for client requests, provide training and support for our clients., and use AI tools to build a "living" knowledge base of our custom builds. You will start with a 60-day trial period focusing on 1–2 key client accounts to demonstrate your ability to manage high-stakes communication, technical triage, and documentation before scaling to the full roster. Key Responsibilities Client Triage & SLA Management: Act as the first point of contact for all support queries. Categorize issues, provide clear ETAs, and ensure no request sits unacknowledged. Direct Client Training: Conduct 1-on-1 or group training sessions via Zoom/Loom to teach clients how to use their specific monday.com setups effectively. AI-Powered Documentation: Use AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, or Scribe) to convert technical workflows into "living" SOPs. You will be responsible for maintaining a centralized knowledge database so that every custom automation is documented and searchable. Technical Maintenance: Troubleshoot and repair Make.com scenario errors and monday.com logic gaps. Knowledge Base Management: Update customer specific documentation and projects in real-time as systems evolve, ensuring the customers have an up to date knowledge base for their systems and software. Requirements & Technical Proficiencies Mastery of monday.com: Deep understanding of Formula columns, high-level Dashboards, and Workforms. Make.com Logic: Ability to read JSON, map complex data structures, and handle error processing. AI Tool Fluency: Experience using AI (LLMs) to summarize technical processes into user-friendly documentation. Google workspace proficiency is a bonus. Gmail, Drive, Gemini, Keep etc… Educational Skills: Ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical business owners without using jargon. The "Gatekeeper" Mindset: Obsessive about organization, task statuses, and meeting deadlines. Your goal is to save me as the lead architect time and focus. If you can successfully do that then we will be a successful partnership!

last_week_candidates.title: Web Developer | GEO & AI Search Technical Specialist
last_week_candidates.summary: We are an AI marketing firm based in Atlanta, Georgia. We specialize in Generative Engine Optimization, helping local businesses appear in AI-generated search results on ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Microsoft Copilot. We are building a...
last_week_candidates.full_description: We are an AI marketing firm based in Atlanta, Georgia. We specialize in Generative Engine Optimization, helping local businesses appear in AI-generated search results on ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Microsoft Copilot. We are building a scalable service delivery operation and need a technically strong web developer to implement backend fixes that make our clients' websites readable, crawlable, and citable by AI search engines. This is not a design role. This is a technical implementation role focused on schema markup, site performance, crawlability, structured data, and CMS-level content publishing. You will receive clear task lists generated from our OtterlyAI audit platform and execute them precisely. What You Will Do Schema Markup Implementation (Primary Focus) This is the most important technical task in our service delivery. You will build and deploy JSON-LD structured data for every client website. Every new client requires a complete schema implementation in Month 1. Ongoing clients receive schema updates as their services or information changes. Specific schema types you will implement regularly: LocalBusiness schema with full NAP data (name, address, phone), service area, business hours, geo coordinates, and founding date where available. Service schema for each individual service a client offers, linked to the parent LocalBusiness entity. FAQPage schema on all key service pages. BreadcrumbList schema for site navigation. Review and AggregateRating schema where client has verifiable review data. OpeningHoursSpecification for businesses with complex or 24/7 schedules, which is critical for HVAC and towing clients. All schema is implemented as JSON-LD in the page head. Never inline RDFa. Test every implementation using Google's Rich Results Test and Schema.org validator before marking complete. AI Crawlability Fixes You will receive crawlability reports from OtterlyAI identifying technical barriers preventing AI bots from reading client websites. Your job is to resolve each flagged item. Common fixes you will execute: Robots.txt audits and corrections. Many client websites block GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, or other AI crawlers either intentionally or by accident through legacy configurations. You will identify blocked bots and add the appropriate allow directives. JavaScript rendering fixes. Content loaded via JavaScript is invisible to most AI crawlers. You will identify pages where key service content, contact information, or structured data is rendered client-side and implement server-side rendering or static fallback content so AI bots see the full page. Page speed improvements affecting crawl budget. Compress images, implement lazy loading, clean up unused scripts, and verify Core Web Vitals are not causing crawlers to time out or deprioritize the site. XML sitemap verification and submission. Confirm sitemaps are current, include all key service pages, and are submitted to Google Search Console and Bing Webmaster Tools. Canonical tag review to ensure AI crawlers are not indexing duplicate or thin content pages. WordPress and CMS Implementation The majority of our clients are on WordPress. Some may be on Wix, Squarespace, or custom HTML sites. You will: Publish GEO-optimized content written by our Claude AI workflow. Content arrives formatted and ready. Your job is to publish it correctly with proper heading structure (H1, H2, H3 hierarchy), internal links to relevant service pages, meta title and meta description populated, correct category and tag assignments, and featured image added if provided. Install and configure Yoast SEO or Rank Math on WordPress sites that do not already have an SEO plugin. Configure site-wide settings: organization schema at site level, social profiles linked, XML sitemap enabled. Create new service pages when our content team produces content for services a client has not previously featured on their website. These pages need to match the existing site design, load correctly on mobile, and pass the OtterlyAI crawlability check before being marked complete. Monthly Technical Maintenance Each month you will receive a short technical task list per active client based on the latest OtterlyAI audit recommendations. Typical monthly tasks include updating schema when client hours, services, or pricing changes, fixing any crawlability issues flagged in the weekly audit, publishing new content articles produced by the VA and Claude workflow, and verifying that previously implemented schema is still valid and rendering correctly. You will log all completed tasks in our shared Google Sheet client tracker with the date completed and any notes for the team. Occasional Development Projects As we grows you may be asked to build simple landing pages for specific service areas, implement tracking pixels for Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager, connect client websites to Google Business Profile APIs for automated data syncing, and support the eventual integration of OtterlyAI API data into client reporting dashboards. Tools and Technologies You must be proficient in these before applying: WordPress (theme editing, plugin configuration, page publishing, settings management) JSON-LD schema markup (LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList at minimum) HTML and CSS (sufficient to edit page templates and fix rendering issues) Google Search Console (sitemap submission, crawl error identification, index coverage review) Bing Webmaster Tools (sitemap submission, crawl verification) Google Rich Results Test and Schema.org Validator robots.txt configuration Basic JavaScript debugging (sufficient to identify JS-rendered content problems) Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager (basic implementation) Familiarity with these is a strong advantage: Yoast SEO or Rank Math plugin configuration Core Web Vitals optimization Cloudflare or similar CDN configuration Wix, Squarespace, or Webflow (for non-WordPress clients) Google Business Profile API n8n or Make.com (for future automation work) Who You Are You are technically precise. Schema errors, unclosed tags, and broken robots.txt configurations are things you catch before they cause problems, not after. You are fast but not careless. Our clients pay monthly retainers and their monthly deliverables need to go out on schedule. You understand deadlines and communicate proactively when something will take longer than expected. You can work from a task list without needing to redesign everything. We are not asking you to rebuild client websites. We are asking you to implement specific technical improvements to existing sites. You follow the brief exactly and ask for clarification before making assumptions. You understand why the technical work you are doing matters to AI search. You do not need to be a GEO expert, but you should understand at the level of "schema markup helps AI tools understand what this business is and where it is" so you can make intelligent decisions when the task list has ambiguity. You communicate in English clearly and professionally. You will interact with the team lead and occasionally with the VA team. Written communication needs to be clean and unambiguous. Requirements Minimum 2 years of professional web development experience Demonstrated experience with schema markup implementation, with examples you can show Strong WordPress proficiency across multiple client sites simultaneously Reliable high-speed internet with backup option Available for a minimum of 10 to 15 hours per week with potential to grow Ability to turn around standard technical tasks (schema implementation, robots.txt fix, content publishing) within 24 to 48 hours of receiving the task What We Offer Good base pay. A team of strong, integrous individuals. Part-time to start (10 to 15 hours per week) with clear growth path as client volume increases Fully remote and asynchronous work Clear task lists generated from our audit platform, no ambiguity about what needs to be done Long-term stable engagement built on monthly client retainers, not project-based gigs Paid training on OtterlyAI audit outputs and GEO-specific technical requirements Direct access to the firm owner for priority questions How to Apply Cover letter - Include the following: Two examples of schema markup you have implemented on live websites. Paste the JSON-LD code directly in your email or provide URLs where we can verify it with Google's Rich Results Test. If you have never implemented a schema, do not apply. A brief description of a robots.txt problem you identified and fixed on a client site. What was blocked, how did you find it, and what did you change? Your WordPress experience summary: how many sites have you managed simultaneously, which plugins you know well, and whether you have worked in multisite environments. Your available hours, time zone, and typical turnaround time for a standard schema implementation task. Applications without all four items will not be reviewed. Applications that say "see my portfolio" instead of answering the questions directly will not be reviewed.

last_week_candidates.title: AI-Assisted Ecommerce Writer
last_week_candidates.summary: About the role We're looking for a talented writer to join our e-commerce team. You'll be crafting high-converting advertorials and native ad copies — and working directly with Claude Code, an AI-powered command-line tool, to scale and optimize your output...
last_week_candidates.full_description: About the role We're looking for a talented writer to join our e-commerce team. You'll be crafting high-converting advertorials and native ad copies — and working directly with Claude Code, an AI-powered command-line tool, to scale and optimize your output. Full Claude Code training will be provided, so no prior experience with it is required. Key responsibilities - Write compelling advertorials and native ad copies for e-commerce products - Work with Claude Code to streamline and scale content production - Follow established SOPs and brand guidelines for all copy - Collaborate with team members to align copy with campaign goals - Continuously test and refine messaging based on performance feedback - Maintain organized documentation of drafts, versions, and final copies Required skills & experience - Proven experience in copywriting, content writing, or related field - Strong written English — clarity, tone, and persuasion matter here - Ability to write in different voices and adapt to brand guidelines - Comfortable working with AI tools (prior experience with ChatGPT or similar is a plus) - Self-motivated with the ability to meet deadlines independently - Detail-oriented and able to follow structured SOPs Note to applicants: You don't need to know Claude Code to apply — we'll train you. What matters most is that you can write well and are eager to work smarter using AI. If you're a strong writer who's curious about AI tools, you could be a great fit for this role. Employment details - Initial test period: 2–3 weeks - Potential for ongoing employment after successful completion - Comprehensive onboarding and Claude Code training provided Application process If you love writing, care about making every word count, and are excited to work at the intersection of copywriting and AI — we'd love to hear from you! Important — to apply, you must answer these 3 questions: - Describe your experience with copywriting or content writing. Share examples if you have them. - Why should we hire you for this role? - Have you used any AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) in your writing workflow? If so, how?

last_week_candidates.title: AI GENERALIST / AUTOMATION SPECIALIST
last_week_candidates.summary: Full-time, Mon to Fri. Core overlap required: 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM PST | $1,500 to $2,200/month | Long-Term WHAT THIS ROLE IS You are the AI right-hand to the CEO. You live inside our tools and turn messy, manual work into clean, AI-powered systems. You take a...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Full-time, Mon to Fri. Core overlap required: 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM PST | $1,500 to $2,200/month | Long-Term WHAT THIS ROLE IS You are the AI right-hand to the CEO. You live inside our tools and turn messy, manual work into clean, AI-powered systems. You take a vague problem ("our daily sales data is a pain to pull together") and come back with a working solution, built and documented. This is a builder role, not a "I use ChatGPT sometimes" role. You should be excited by the chance to automate real work across a group of businesses (restaurants, frozen yogurt, real estate) and watch your systems run every day without you. MUST-HAVES (read this before you apply) Proven experience building AI-powered automations and workflows end to end, with real examples you can show us Fluent across the modern AI stack: ChatGPT and Claude, plus automation tools (Zapier, Make, or n8n). Light scripting (Google Apps Script, Python) is a strong plus. Comfortable connecting tools through APIs and integrations You can take a vague request and ship a finished, working solution with no hand-holding C2 (Mastery) English, written and verbal If any of these do not fit, please do not apply. Save us both the time. ================================================== MANDATORY: 60 TO 90 SECOND VIDEO (READ THIS) No video = automatic rejection. No exceptions. This is the most important part of your application. We watch it FIRST. No video link, we move on to the next person. On camera, tell us, in this order: Who you are and your AI / automation background One thing you built or automated with AI: the problem, what you built, and the result Your current AI tool stack and what you use each tool for Why you want this role Use Loom, unlisted YouTube, or Google Drive, and paste the link in your application. Speak naturally. We want your real spoken English and how you think. Do not over-script it. ================================================== WHO WE ARE A fast-casual restaurant brand built on quality, simplicity, and culture. We do not cut corners and we do not settle for "good enough." Faith-guided. We do not require you to share our faith, but we do require respect for the values that flow from it. High standard. Think the best fast-casual experience you have ever had: spotless, exceptional, every person genuinely glad to help. That is our bar. People-first. We treat our team like family, with high standards starting at the top. WHAT YOU WILL DO Build and maintain AI-powered automations that remove manual, repetitive work Build internal tools, agents, and assistants (for example, custom GPTs and Claude Projects) that the team actually uses Connect our systems so data flows automatically instead of by copy and paste Run AI-assisted research and turn it into clean, decision-ready deliverables Build trackers, dashboards, and reports that update themselves Document every system you build and train the team to use it Work across the businesses: restaurant, frozen yogurt, and real estate WHAT WE VALUE Service first: genuine care for everyone you interact with on our behalf, vendors, team, clients Honesty over comfort: say it when something is wrong, praise in public, handle issues in private Ownership: when something breaks, you fix it and learn, no finger-pointing. When you are handed a problem with no instructions, you build the plan yourself. Relentless quality: you find the best solution within the constraints and ship it with confidence Stewardship: you treat the CEO's time, information, and relationships like your own BONUS POINTS (not required) Experience with restaurants, real estate, or multi-unit operations Hands-on with our stack: Toast, Notion, Asana, Slack, Gmail, Google Workspace Experience building agents, RAG systems, or chatbots Data and dashboard skills (Looker Studio, Sheets, or similar) HOW TO APPLY Send ONE message with ALL of the following. Subject line: "AI Generalist: [Your Name]" Your video link (mandatory, see the video section above) Your resume A work sample: a short Loom walking us through one AI automation or tool you built. Show the actual build, do not just describe it. Redact anything confidential. This is the most important written item. Your OnlineJobs.ph IQ score and DISC profile (any provider). The IQ score is not used to rank you, but including it shows you can follow instructions. Short written answers to these two questions: a. Walk me through one AI workflow or automation you built end to end. The problem, what you built, the tools you used, and the result (time saved, errors reduced, money saved). b. I want our daily Toast sales export turned into a short Slack summary every morning, automatically. At a high level, how would you build it, and what tools would you use? Any application without a video, or missing any item above, will not be reviewed. No exceptions.

last_week_candidates.title: E-Commerce Growth Analyst (Amazon Focus)
last_week_candidates.pay_note: $800 - $1200 / month based on experience treated as monthly
last_week_candidates.summary: At Ingreendients, we’re building one of the world’s most transparent hair care and body care brand. Every product we make is rooted in exceptional performance, transparency, ingredient integrity, and environmental responsibility. We’re looking for a highly...
last_week_candidates.full_description: At Ingreendients, we’re building one of the world’s most transparent hair care and body care brand. Every product we make is rooted in exceptional performance, transparency, ingredient integrity, and environmental responsibility. We’re looking for a highly analytical, AI-first problem solver to work directly with our CEO and Founder. This is not a traditional Amazon VA role. You’ll help analyze data, optimize advertising, identify growth opportunities, build systems, and continuously improve how we operate. If you enjoy solving puzzles, working with numbers, using AI, and finding better ways to do things, we’d love to hear from you. Please note, that we are looking for a long term role and not interested in anything short term. The right candidate will grow with the company both in terms of learning opportunities and compensation. IMPORTANT: This is an execution-focused role. You should be excited to roll up your sleeves and jump deep into analysis, problem solving and execution. This is not a strategy role. What You’ll Do * Analyze Amazon advertising performance and identify opportunities for improvement * Optimize PPC campaigns through keyword research, search term analysis, bid adjustments, negative keyword management, and campaign structure improvements * Monitor key business metrics including ROAS, ACOS, TACOS, CTR, conversion rate, and organic rankings * Build reports and dashboards that summarize business performance and provide actionable recommendations * Conduct competitor and marketplace research * Use AI tools to improve workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and increase efficiency * Assist with Amazon listing optimization, SEO, catalog management, and product launches * Conduct A/B tests to optimize images, headlines, content etc. * Own and drive creator connections program * Monitor inventory levels and performance * Support additional e-commerce initiatives across Shopify and other online marketplaces as needed * Document processes and create SOPs that improve consistency and scalability * Work closely with the Founder on new ideas, experiments, and growth initiatives Qualifications * 5+ years working with Amazon Seller Central * Strong written and spoken English * Experience managing or supporting Amazon PPC campaigns * Strong AI skills in ChatGPT and Claude, and/or other AI skills in daily work like Gemini etc. * Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills * Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities * Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail * Comfortable learning new software and AI tools quickly * Self-motivated and able to work independently Nice to Have * Experience with Helium 10, DataDive, Sellerboard, Scale Insights, or similar Amazon tools * Basic knowledge of Shopify * Experience with APIs, Python, SQL, or Looker Studio * Familiarity with Google Ads, Meta Ads, or Klaviyo Who You Are: You are naturally curious. You enjoy working with data. You ask “why?” instead of simply following instructions. You take ownership of your work. You enjoy improving systems and making processes more efficient. You are excited to grow alongside a fast-growing consumer brand. What Success Looks Like: Within your first six months, you’ll be expected to: * Independently manage the day-to-day optimization of our Amazon advertising account * Consistently identify new opportunities backed by data * Build AI-assisted workflows that save time and improve decision-making * Deliver clear, actionable weekly performance reports * Become a trusted thought partner to the Founder on Amazon growth To Apply Please submit: 1. Your resume (PDF) 2. A brief cover letter explaining why this role interests you 3. Three examples of Amazon accounts, brands, or projects you’ve worked on (describe your contribution in detail) 4. One example of an analysis or recommendation you made that improved performance 5. A list of the AI tools you currently use in your workflow and how you use them 6. 3 U.S. based clean hair care and body care brands that resonate with you and why We value curiosity, ownership, continuous improvement, and strong communication more than checking every box. If you’re excited about building something meaningful and enjoy solving difficult problems, we’d love to hear from you. WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE We are building AI-assisted operational systems to scale a modern eCommerce brand efficiently. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys: * systems * execution * AI tools * process improvement * digital operations and wants to grow alongside the business long term. COMPENSATION: * Full-time (40 hrs/week) * $800–$1,200/month depending on experience and skill level * Long-term growth opportunity for strong performers

last_week_candidates.title: Experienced Social Media Manager & Community Manager — Car Rental / Automotive Niche (Full-Time, Long-Term)
last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: Content Creation Social Media Management Community Moderation
last_week_candidates.summary: ABOUT US: We run a fast-growing economy car rental business in Dallas, TX that rents vehicles to rideshare and gig economy workers (Uber, Lyft, Amazon Flex, medical couriers). We also run a coaching/education brand teaching others how to build the same...
last_week_candidates.full_description: ABOUT US: We run a fast-growing economy car rental business in Dallas, TX that rents vehicles to rideshare and gig economy workers (Uber, Lyft, Amazon Flex, medical couriers). We also run a coaching/education brand teaching others how to build the same business model. We're scaling rapidly and need a social media manager who can keep up with the pace, execute independently, and help us dominate our niche online. This is NOT a "schedule posts and disappear" role. This is a hands-on, strategic position where you'll be managing content, engaging communities, running our Telegram group, and helping us grow our brand across multiple platforms. WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING: Social Media Management (Primary Focus): •Plan, create, and schedule content across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube •Write captions, hooks, and CTAs that drive engagement and conversions •Analyze post performance and adjust strategy based on data (not guesses) •Research trending audio, hashtags, and content formats in our niche •Repurpose long-form content (podcast clips, masterclass recordings) into short-form reels and posts •Monitor competitors and identify content opportunities •Manage DMs and comments — respond to inquiries, nurture leads, and direct people to our offers Community Management (Telegram & Beyond): •Manage and engage our Telegram group daily — post content, answer questions, keep the energy high •Execute our pre-masterclass nurture sequences (we run live masterclasses twice a week) •Drop links, flyers, and announcements on schedule •Monitor group activity and flag important conversations Masterclass & Launch Support: •Help coordinate masterclass promotions (posting countdowns, reminders, Zoom links) •Assist with webinar follow-up sequences •Track registrations and attendance AI & Productivity: •Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Manus, Canva AI, CapCut) to increase output and quality •Create graphics, carousels, and video edits using AI-assisted tools •Research and implement new AI workflows to stay ahead of the competition WHO YOU ARE: •Experienced — You have 2+ years managing social media for a brand (not just your personal account). You have case studies, analytics screenshots, or portfolio links to prove it. •Self-Starter — You don't wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you do it. You bring ideas to the table. •Niche-Aware — You understand (or can quickly learn) the car rental, automotive, side hustle, and entrepreneur space on social media. You know what performs in this world. •AI-Savvy — You actively use AI tools in your workflow. ChatGPT, Claude, Canva, CapCut, automation tools — these are part of your daily routine, not something you've "heard of." •Data-Driven — You don't just post and hope. You track what works, what doesn't, and you adjust. You can read Instagram Insights, TikTok Analytics, and explain what the numbers mean. •Fast & Reliable — You meet deadlines. You communicate proactively. You don't disappear. You're available during US business hours (CST timezone). •Long-Term Mindset — You're not looking for a 2-week gig. You want to grow WITH a brand and be part of something bigger. MUST-HAVE SKILLS: •Instagram Reels, Stories, and carousel creation •TikTok content strategy and posting •Canva (advanced — not just basic templates) •Video editing (CapCut, InShot, or similar) •Copywriting for social media (hooks, CTAs, storytelling) ???Telegram group management •AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Manus, or similar) •Basic understanding of sales funnels and lead generation •Excellent written English •Available during US Central Time (CST) working hours NICE-TO-HAVE: •Experience in the car rental, automotive, or gig economy niche •Experience managing communities for coaches/course creators ???Email marketing (GoHighLevel, Mailchimp, or similar) •Podcast/YouTube content repurposing experience HOW TO APPLY (READ THIS CAREFULLY): I'm hiring within 24 hours. If you want this job, you need to stand out. Here's what I need from you: Step 1: Send me a message with the subject line: "I'm Your SMM — [Your Name]" Step 2: In your message, answer these 3 questions: 1.Show me your work. Send me 1-2 links to social media accounts you've managed (not your personal account). Include a brief explanation of what you did and what results you achieved (follower growth, engagement rate, sales generated, etc.) 2.Prove you use AI. Tell me specifically which AI tools you use daily and give me ONE example of how AI has helped you produce better or faster work for a client. 3.Quick Task: Go to my Instagram page @alishagotk3ys. Look at the last 10 posts. In 3-4 sentences, tell me what I'm doing wrong and what you would change IMMEDIATELY to increase engagement. Be specific. Don't be generic. Step 3: Tell me your available start date and confirm you're comfortable with the starting rate of $3-$4/hr (40 hrs/week) with performance-based raises. IMPORTANT NOTES: •Applications that don't follow the 3-step process above will be ignored. I need someone who follows instructions. •I will be conducting video interviews tomorrow (Saturday). Be prepared to show your screen and walk me through your workflow. •This is a LONG-TERM position. I'm building a team, not hiring for a project. •If you're a beginner looking to "learn social media," this is not the role for you. I need someone who can teach ME things, not the other way around. •Start date: Immediately upon hiring (within 24-48 hours) •Starting rate is $3-$4/hr with performance-based raises. If you're only motivated by money upfront and not by the opportunity to grow with a brand, this isn't for you. TO SUMMARIZE: I need a social media manager who: ? Has proven experience growing brands on Instagram & TikTok ? Can manage a Telegram community and keep engagement high ? Uses AI tools daily to increase speed and quality ? Understands the entrepreneur/side hustle/automotive niche ? Can execute from Day 1 without hand-holding ? Is available during US CST hours ? Wants a long-term role with growth potential If that's you, follow the application steps above and let's talk tomorrow. ????

last_week_candidates.full_description: PROCTORAI SYSTEMS Position Title: GoHighLevel Implementation & Automation Specialist Location: Remote (Philippines) Employment Type: Part-Time Contractor (10–20 Hours Per Week) Compensation: $8–12 USD Per Hour (Based on Experience) ABOUT PROCTORAI ProctorAI is an AI and business automation company specializing in CRM implementation, workflow automation, lead management, and business systems. We help businesses streamline operations, improve client communication, and leverage automation to increase efficiency and growth. We are seeking a detail-oriented GoHighLevel Implementation & Automation Specialist to assist with CRM setup, workflow automation, client onboarding, quality assurance, and process documentation. RESPONSIBILITIES • Configure and customize GoHighLevel accounts • Build and manage CRM pipelines • Create workflows and automations • Configure calendars and appointment booking systems • Build forms, surveys, and landing pages • Assist with Zapier integrations and third-party connections • Perform quality assurance testing • Create implementation documentation and SOPs • Assist with client onboarding and support • Collaborate on development of industry-specific templates REQUIRED EXPERIENCE • Experience using GoHighLevel • Experience creating workflows and automations • Experience configuring pipelines and opportunities • Strong written and verbal English communication • Strong attention to detail • Reliable internet connection • Ability to work independently and meet deadlines PREFERRED EXPERIENCE • Zapier integrations • CRM administration experience • Real estate CRM experience • Marketing automation • AI tools including ChatGPT and Claude • Client training or onboarding experience WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE Within your first 90 days, you will help: • Build and refine ProctorAI implementation templates • Support new client implementations • Improve documentation and standard operating procedures • Contribute to a repeatable delivery system that can scale across multiple industries APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS To be considered, please provide: 1. A brief introduction about yourself. 2. The number of GoHighLevel accounts you have worked on. 3. Examples of workflows or automations you have built. 4. Any experience with Zapier integrations. 5. A 2–3 minute video introduction explaining your experience. 6. Your expected hourly rate. SCREENING QUESTION Describe how you would onboard a new Realtor client from the signed agreement through launch in GoHighLevel. We are looking for someone who enjoys building systems, solving problems, and helping businesses grow through automation.

last_week_candidates.title: GoHighLevel Implementation Specialist (Part-Time)
last_week_candidates.summary: I'm looking for ONE part-time GoHighLevel Implementation Specialist to help us deliver CRM systems for comedians and live entertainment venues. We've already built the core CRM systems, snapshots and automations. You won't be building everything from scratch...
last_week_candidates.full_description: I'm looking for ONE part-time GoHighLevel Implementation Specialist to help us deliver CRM systems for comedians and live entertainment venues. We've already built the core CRM systems, snapshots and automations. You won't be building everything from scratch. Instead, you'll help onboard clients, customise our existing systems, build polished landing pages, test everything thoroughly, troubleshoot issues, and continually improve the way we deliver. This is a long-term position for someone who enjoys solving technical problems, building clean systems, and creating a polished client experience. What You'll Be Doing Client Onboarding - Create and configure GoHighLevel sub-accounts - Connect domains and configure DNS records - Set up email sending and deliverability - Configure phone numbers and SMS (A2P) - Connect integrations where required - QA everything before it goes live CRM Implementation - Duplicate and customise our existing CRM snapshots - Build and customise clean, professional landing pages - Update landing pages with client branding, images and copy - Update email and SMS sequences - Configure workflows and automations - Populate funnels with client content - Test every email, workflow, form and automation before handoff Ongoing Improvements - Troubleshoot technical issues - Diagnose and fix problems - Suggest improvements to our existing systems - Help document processes as we continue to grow What You Need - Previous GoHighLevel experience (required) - Experience building workflows and automations - Strong landing page design skills - Good eye for layout, spacing and visual design - Comfortable working with DNS and domain settings - Excellent attention to detail - Strong written English - Reliable internet connection - Available for approximately 20 hours per week (Opportunity to move to full-time for the right person.) Bonus Skills - Canva or Figma - Basic HTML/CSS - ManyChat - Zapier or Make - AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) - Meta Business Manager Who This Is For - You enjoy solving technical problems. - You care about making both the front-end and back-end look professional. - You naturally test your work before saying it's finished. - You like making systems cleaner and more reliable. - You don't mind repetitive work, but you also enjoy improving processes when you spot a better way. - You take ownership of problems instead of making excuses. - If something isn't working, your first instinct is to figure out why. The comedians we work with often use strong language and adult humour, so you should be comfortable working with that. This Is NOT - A customer support role - A sales role - A general virtual assistant position A marketing strategy role This is a technical client implementation role. A Quick Clarification You will not be building or managing our own internal CRM. You'll be working inside our clients' GoHighLevel accounts, helping onboard new clients and implementing CRM systems as part of our service. Every client already has a proven framework, snapshot and process to work from. Your job is to customise it for each client, make sure everything is working correctly, make the client-facing pages look polished, test everything thoroughly, and continually improve our delivery process. To Be Considered Please follow these instructions exactly. - Use the word COMEDY in your subject line. - Select 6 AP points when applying. - Tell me how long you've been using GoHighLevel. - Briefly describe the best landing page or workflow you've built in GoHighLevel. Applications that don't follow these instructions won't be considered.

last_week_candidates.title: Growth and Marketing Technology Specialist
last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: Marketing Marketing Automation Social Media Content Creation
last_week_candidates.summary: "Opportunities don't happen. You create them." – Chris Grosser ------ About Barnes Nest (US) Barnes Nest is a U.S.-based online marketplace for home services. Our mission is simple: make hiring a trusted local contractor easy, safe, and fair — for both sides...
last_week_candidates.full_description: "Opportunities don't happen. You create them." – Chris Grosser ------ About Barnes Nest (US) Barnes Nest is a U.S.-based online marketplace for home services. Our mission is simple: make hiring a trusted local contractor easy, safe, and fair — for both sides. Homeowners post a project, compare quotes from verified local pros, and pay securely through escrow, so money is only released when the work is approved. Contractors and handymen get real local jobs with no lead fees — they only pay a small percentage on jobs they actually complete. We're launching in our first U.S. metro, and we need someone who can help us grow it smarter, not just harder. ------ About the Role This isn't a traditional marketing role. We're looking for someone who enjoys figuring things out. Someone who sees a manual, repetitive task and immediately starts looking for a way to automate it. You'll work directly with the founder to grow both sides of the marketplace — using AI, no-code automation, and smart marketing to bring contractors and homeowners onto the platform and keep them active. No two weeks look the same. One week you may be building an automated outreach sequence with a no-code tool. The next you could be setting up an AI workflow to qualify leads, designing a content engine for social, building a simple dashboard, or testing a new channel to find users faster. If you enjoy learning and love making things run on their own, this role will never become repetitive. ------ What You'll Be Doing - Drive growth on both sides of the marketplace — contractors and homeowners - Build and automate outreach and marketing workflows using no-code tools - Use AI to speed up research, lead qualification, content, and follow-up - Set up and manage CRM and marketing automation (sequences, triggers, tracking) - Grow and run our social channels with a repeatable content system - Find, test, and scale new channels to acquire users - Build simple reports and dashboards to track what's working - Document the systems you build so they can scale to new cities - Research new AI and automation tools and recommend what to adopt ------ What We're Looking For We're far more interested in attitude and ability than a perfect résumé. Fresh graduates are welcome to apply The ideal person is: - Naturally curious - Loves solving problems and removing manual work - Highly organised - Comfortable learning new software fast - Not afraid of technology or AI - Works independently with minimal supervision - Takes ownership instead of waiting for instructions - Goal-driven and focused on outcomes - Analytical and enjoys working with data - Always looking for a faster, smarter way to do things - From Manila preferred and be able to cowork in person once a week ------ Technical Skills Experience in some (not necessarily all) of the following is highly desirable: - AI platforms including ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini - No-code automation tools (Zapier, Make, n8n or similar) - Marketing platforms and email/outreach tools - CRM platforms and pipeline management - Social media management and content tools (Canva, schedulers) - Reporting, analytics, and dashboards - List-building / prospecting tools (Apollo, Hunter or similar) Bonus points if you've: - Built AI workflows or agents - Connected AI tools with no-code automations - Created an automated lead-gen or content engine - Used AI to improve processes rather than just generate content - Worked with U.S. clients, home services, or marketplace/startup growth ------ Who Will Thrive Here You'll love this role if you enjoy: - Learning something new every week - Automating away repetitive work - Building systems that scale - Finding efficiencies and better channels - Working with AI and no-code tools - Turning ideas into working processes - Watching numbers grow because of something you built ------ What We Offer - Full-time remote position — day shift, 8:00 AM start - Direct mentoring from the members - A real chance to grow with us as we scale to more cities ------ How to Apply Send your application along with the following: - Start your message with the word "NEST" so we know you read this post. - Briefly tell us about your growth, marketing, or automation experience — including any results. - Which AI tools do you currently use, and how have you used them beyond writing content? - Describe one workflow or process you've automated. What was manual before, and what did you build? - List the no-code, automation, and marketing tools you've worked with. Applications without the word "NEST" will not be considered. We value thoughtful applications over generic ones. If you're curious, love AI and automation, and enjoy building systems that grow a business, we'd love to hear from you. *** Road to becoming a 'Go-To-Market (GTM) Engineer' ***

last_week_candidates.summary: Are you organized, tech-savvy, and good at keeping information clean, accurate, and easy to find? We’re looking for a Marketing & CRM Operations Support Virtual Professional to help a growing service business with CRM updates, reporting support, data cleanup...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Are you organized, tech-savvy, and good at keeping information clean, accurate, and easy to find? We’re looking for a Marketing & CRM Operations Support Virtual Professional to help a growing service business with CRM updates, reporting support, data cleanup, backend admin tasks, and process documentation. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working behind the scenes, learning new tools, spotting details others miss, and helping a team stay organized. This is not a sales or creative marketing role. This is a backend support role focused on systems, data accuracy, reports, workflows, documentation, and follow-through. What You’ll Do You may help with tasks such as: • Update and clean CRM records • Check that lead, appointment, customer, and sales information is accurate • Review data for missing, duplicate, or incorrect information • Help prepare simple reports, dashboards, and summaries • Support backend workflows between different business tools • Help organize lead source, appointment, and sales tracking information • Document processes and create simple SOPs • Communicate updates, blockers, and completed tasks clearly • Coordinate with team members or platform support when needed • Use AI tools responsibly to improve documentation, reporting, and written communication Tools You May Work With Experience with these tools is a plus, but you do not need to have experience with all of them: • HubSpot or another CRM • Google Sheets or Excel • Call tracking or phone systems • Scheduling or appointment tools • Website platforms like Webflow or WordPress • Project management or task tracking tools • AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude We are more interested in someone who is organized, curious, detail-oriented, and comfortable learning systems than in someone who has already used every tool. You May Be a Great Fit If You Are • Detail-oriented and organized • Comfortable learning new software and online platforms • Good at following instructions and documenting your work • Able to spot errors or inconsistencies in data, reports, and records • Clear in written English communication • Proactive, resourceful, and willing to figure things out before escalating • Comfortable working independently in a remote setup • Able to ask thoughtful questions when something is unclear • Trustworthy with client, customer, and business information • Interested in backend admin, CRM, reporting, data cleanup, or operations support • Experienced working remotely with a US-based client, company, or team is highly preferred Preferred Experience Any experience in the following areas is a plus: • CRM admin or CRM cleanup • Sales operations or marketing operations support • Reporting or dashboard support • Data entry, data cleanup, or lead tracking • SOP creation or process documentation • Backend admin support for a service-based business • Google Sheets, Excel, HubSpot, or similar tools • Remote work experience supporting a US-based client, company, or team Tech & Infrastructure Requirements To ensure a reliable remote setup, applicants must have: • Reliable laptop or desktop computer • Stable internet connection with backup connection • Webcam, microphone, and headset • Ability to provide device specs and internet speed test if requested Why You’ll Love Working With Us • Paid holidays and PTO • HMO after your first year • Family Medical Incentive • PAG-IBIG and referral incentives • Weekends off • Free learning sessions • Fun company events • Supportive remote work community • Opportunity to build a meaningful long-term career To Apply Please answer the following: • Tell us briefly about your work experience. • What tools or software have you used before? • What type of backend admin, CRM, reporting, or data work have you done? • Why do you think you would be a good fit for this role? Don’t just look for a job — build a meaningful career with freedom, balance, and the support you deserve. Apply today.
