last_week_candidates.summary: We’re looking for someone to build, optimize, and maintain our HubSpot CRM while helping us create an AI-driven sales management system. The goal is to eliminate as much time as possible spent inside HubSpot without sacrificing visibility or organization. For...
last_week_candidates.full_description: We’re looking for someone to build, optimize, and maintain our HubSpot CRM while helping us create an AI-driven sales management system. The goal is to eliminate as much time as possible spent inside HubSpot without sacrificing visibility or organization. For example, we’d like to interact with our CRM using natural language: * “What are my priorities today?” * “What follow-ups are due?” * “Which deals are stalled?” * “Who hasn’t responded in over a week?” * “What is Jose supposed to work on today?” * “Summarize my pipeline.” * “Draft follow-up emails for today’s tasks.” HubSpot should remain the source of truth, but we’d like AI to become the primary interface for reviewing sales activity, managing priorities, and making decisions. This role will also include keeping HubSpot organized by maintaining contacts, companies, deals, tasks, notes, automations, and reporting. Application Questions Rather than telling you exactly how we want this built, we’d like you to tell us how you would build it. Please answer the following: * How would you approach this project? * Is this the right architecture, or would you recommend something different? * How would you connect HubSpot with ChatGPT, Claude, or another AI platform? * Would you recommend AI only reads HubSpot, or should it also be able to update records? * How would you ensure the system remains reliable and doesn’t become a maintenance headache? * What parts of HubSpot should remain manual? * What parts should be automated? * What tools, integrations, or APIs would you use? * Have you built anything similar? If so, please describe it. We’re looking for someone who can think through the entire system, recommend the best approach, build it, and continue improving it over time—not someone who simply manages CRM records.

last_week_candidates.summary: Management Accountant, Financial Dashboard Build (Short-term Project) About the role: We are looking for an experienced management accountant to join us on a short-term project (4-6 weeks) to build a live financial dashboard and supporting management accounts...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Management Accountant, Financial Dashboard Build (Short-term Project) About the role: We are looking for an experienced management accountant to join us on a short-term project (4-6 weeks) to build a live financial dashboard and supporting management accounts for a DTC ecommerce client. This is a hands-on build role. You will be designing and delivering a daily financial dashboard that pulls data from multiple sources via APIs (Zapier, Airtable, Shopify, Meta Ads, bank feeds), presenting estimated and actual figures with variance reporting across revenue, cost of goods, advertising spend, staff costs and overheads. The dashboard needs to work on a rolling daily basis, with data refreshing within 24-48 hours of the source transactions. You will be working under the direction of the Finance Director who will provide the data sets, access credentials and the overall structure. Your job is to take that brief and build the thing, working largely independently on the technical delivery. What you will be building The first deliverable is a daily financial dashboard with the following characteristics: (a) High-level summary rows for revenue, cost of goods, gross profit, expenses, VAT and net profit, with drill-down capability into subcategories (advertising by channel, COGS by supplier, staff costs by source). (b) Three-column structure per day: Estimate, Actual and Variance, with favourable/unfavourable variance logic built in. (c) Dual views: an accruals-based dashboard and a cash-based dashboard. (d) Populated initially with estimated costs (COGS from supplier invoices, staff costs from historical data, ad spend from recent actuals), then progressively replaced with live data as the API integrations come online. (e) Connected via Zapier (or similar) to Shopify (UK, US and ROW stores), Meta Ads, TikTok Shop, Stripe, PayPal, Revolut, Wise, Remote and Airtable (creator contracts), pulling actuals automatically. (f) Built with scalability in mind. The client is expanding into a group structure (multiple brands and entities), so the dashboard needs to be designed in a way that can be replicated and consolidated across additional businesses in the near future. Following the dashboard build, you will assist with Xero integration work: aligning the chart of accounts, reconciling recent months and ensuring the management accounts output ties back to the dashboard figures. What we need from you Essential: You are a qualified or part-qualified management accountant (CIMA or equivalent) with demonstrable experience building financial dashboards and management accounts from scratch, not just maintaining existing ones. You are comfortable working with AI tools and using them in your workflow. This is not optional. We use Claude, ChatGPT and similar tools as part of our delivery process and expect you to do the same. You have hands-on experience with API-driven data pipelines, whether through Zapier or direct API work. You need to be able to connect data sources, map fields and troubleshoot when feeds break. You have experience with Xero (or a comparable cloud accounting platform) and understand how to structure a chart of accounts for ecommerce businesses with multi-channel, multi-currency revenue. You can work independently with minimal supervision once given the brief and access. Preferred: Experience designing management accounts and dashboards for ecommerce, DTC or Shopify-based businesses. Familiarity with A2X, Finaloop or similar ecommerce accounting connectors. Experience building financial models that can scale across a company group (consolidated reporting, intercompany, multi-entity). Understanding of contribution margin, MER (marketing efficiency ratio) and channel-level unit economics. Practical details This is a remote, freelance contract. Hours are approximately 20 to 30 per week for an initial 4-week period, with the possibility of extending to 6 weeks depending on progress. Rate is $8-15 per hour Depending on Experience. There is potential for this to develop into a longer-term management accountant role as the client's group structure grows, but the immediate need is the project build. To apply Please include in your proposal: (a) A copy of your CV. (b) A brief summary of a financial dashboard or management accounts pack you have built from scratch, including what tools and data sources were involved. (c) Your experience with Zapier or similar API/automation tools. (d) Your accounting qualifications and level. (e) Your availability to start (ideally within the next week).

last_week_candidates.full_description: **Applications without a Loom video will not be considered!** Part-Time | Remote | $8–$10/hr | 10 hrs/month (to start) and will scale up to approx 90 hrs/month WHO WE ARE AGENCY678 is a revenue operations and online business management agency. We build and manage the backend systems that allow coaching businesses and agencies to scale properly — from CRM builds and automations to client onboarding, sales infrastructure, and campaign execution. We work inside fast-moving, revenue-generating businesses where systems, speed, and execution matter. We’re growing — and we need someone reliable, switched-on, and execution-focused to support delivery across multiple client accounts. THE ROLE This is an execution-first operations VA role. You are not here to “help out” — you are here to build, implement, and maintain systems properly. You’ll be working directly with the founder and directly with clients to execute backend builds, automations, and operational workflows across client accounts. If you need constant direction or hand-holding, this won’t be a fit. If you’re someone who can take a task, figure it out, and deliver cleanly — keep reading. WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING Systems & Automation - Build and manage workflows, automations, and backend systems - Set up and maintain CRM systems (primarily GoHighLevel/HeyClients) - Create and optimise automations using tools like Zapier and n8n agent - Support AI integrations using OpenAI Chatbots & Lead Flow - Build and manage flows in ManyChat - Support lead capture, qualification, and automation journeys Client Systems & Ops - Set up onboarding systems (Dubsado, HeyClient, forms, automations) - Maintain clean, organised backend systems - Document workflows and SOPs Campaign & Backend Support - Assist with email and campaign setup - Support launches and backend delivery - Ensure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU Non-negotiables: - Experience working with online coaches, agencies, or service providers - Hands-on experience with: GoHighLevel/HeyClients ManyChat Automation tools (Zapier, n8n, or similar) - Comfortable using AI tools (OpenAI) - Strong attention to detail — your work is clean, structured, and reliable - Able to follow instructions and figure things out independently - Good written English and clear communication - Reliable internet and ability to meet deadlines WHO YOU ARE - You’re an executor, not just a thinker - You take ownership of your work and complete tasks properly - You’re resourceful — if you don’t know something, you figure it out - You’re organised and detail-focused - You don’t disappear — communication matters - You want long-term, stable work and to grow with a team WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT - Not a basic admin VA role - Not a “wait for instructions” job - Not for someone juggling 10+ clients with no focus THE DETAILS - Rate: $8–$10/hour (based on experience) - 10 hrs/month (to start) and will scale up to approx 90 hrs/month - Type: Part-time contractor - Location: Remote - Timezone: Must have some overlap with UK or US hours HOW TO APPLY To apply, follow instructions carefully. Include: Your resume A short introduction (max 5–6 sentences) Your experience with the tools listed above (important to have experience with GHL/HeyClients, n8n agent and OpenAI/Claude) A Loom video (MAX 2 minutes) covering: Your background working with online businesses What systems/tools you’ve used (be specific) Why you’d be a good fit for this role Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

last_week_candidates.full_description: ABOUT US Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond. Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Claude and Higgsfield like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold. WHO WE WANT This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can: Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god. You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert. Will be utilizing HIggsfield platform very extensively. WHAT YOU’LL DO Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, meme-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – mainly Higgsfield, Veo3, Sora, Seedancw and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc. Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused. WHO YOU ARE 5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Capcut, Blender, After Effects Pro-level Claude Co Work, Claude Design, Claude Code / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team MUST-HAVES Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–4:00pm PST

last_week_candidates.full_description: About Us Robin Hood Ventures is a real estate wholesaling company based in Richmond, VA. We're building a team of AI employees — automated agents that handle lead qualification, call QA, reporting, and more. We need someone to design the system and own the outcome. About the Role You're not a builder. You're the person who decides what gets built, how it should work, and whether the final product actually matches the vision. You'll design the blueprints for each AI employee, write the functional specs, and manage the AI Builder to make sure every automation is delivered correctly. What You'll Do Map out Robin Hood Ventures' business workflows and identify where AI agents can replace or augment manual work Design detailed blueprints for each AI employee — triggers, logic, tools, prompts, outputs Write clear specs the Builder can execute without guessing QA every build before it goes live — if it doesn't match the blueprint, it goes back Prioritize the build roadmap and keep the Builder on track week to week Flag anything that needs CEO-level input before resources are spent You're a Fit If You Have: Experience designing AI automation systems (not just using them) Deep familiarity with Claude API, Make.com or n8n, GoHighLevel, Twilio, Google Sheets Ability to write airtight specs a contractor can execute without follow-up questions Experience managing or directing a technical builder or developer Clear, direct communication — you'll be the bridge between the CEO's vision and the Builder's execution How to Apply Put BLUEPRINT in your subject line. No BLUEPRINT = no review. Along with BLUEPRINT, send: One AI system you designed — describe the architecture, tools used, and outcome Answer in 3–5 sentences: A CEO tells you he wants an AI agent that listens to sales calls, scores reps, and texts him the top 3 leads by 6am. Walk me through how you'd design it. Compensation $2,500–$3,000/month based on experience Full-time, fully remote Milestone bonuses for shipped phases

last_week_candidates.full_description: We're looking for a mildly obsessive technophile who sees a manual process and immediately starts thinking about how to kill it. We're a fast-moving Health-sharing advisory company. Our ops run lean, our team takes ownership, and we have no shortage of things to fix. We need someone who lives and breathes automation — not for the novelty of it, but because inefficiency genuinely irritates them. What you'll be doing - You'll work directly with our leadership team to identify and eliminate inefficiencies across the business. That means connecting tools that should already be talking to each other, automating workflows that are currently running on willpower, and deploying AI where it actually saves time — not just for show. - This is a contract role with real scope, real impact, and no shortage of problems worth solving. What you need to bring - Spreadsheet automation: You turn bloated, formula-riddled sheets into clean, automated systems. - API integrations: If there's a webhook or an endpoint, connecting platforms is second nature. - HubSpot fluency: Workflows, pipelines, properties, and reporting — you've been in the weeds before. - AI tools & implementation: You know OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and the others — and you know how to put them to work. Who you are - You find inefficiency genuinely irritating — and you do something about it - You translate business problems into technical solutions without needing everything spelled out - You ship. You don't gold-plate. You get things working, then make them better. - You're comfortable working independently and communicating clearly with a non-technical team - You stay current — because you actually want to, not because you have to About us We help individuals and businesses navigate health sharing plans, HSAs, and alternative health coverage options. We're a lean, intentional team that runs on EOS and values people who take ownership. We're serious about what we do, but we don't take ourselves too seriously. How to apply Send an email to operations@hsaforamerica.com. Tell us what you've automated, what tools you've connected, and one thing you've built that you're genuinely proud of. We'll take it from there.

last_week_candidates.title: Operations Manager (Remote) – Systems, KPIs & Business Operations
last_week_candidates.summary: # Operations & Systems Manager (Remote – Full-Time) ### **This is NOT an administrative assistant position.** We are looking for a highly analytical **Operations & Systems Manager** who enjoys building dashboards, developing KPIs, improving business...
last_week_candidates.full_description: # Operations & Systems Manager (Remote – Full-Time) ### **This is NOT an administrative assistant position.** We are looking for a highly analytical **Operations & Systems Manager** who enjoys building dashboards, developing KPIs, improving business processes, facilitating leadership meetings, and helping a CEO execute company strategy. If you love creating systems, organizing chaos, holding teams accountable, and using data to drive decisions, this role is for you. **This position requires someone who can think strategically, build operational infrastructure, and help scale a growing organization—not simply complete administrative tasks.** --- ## About Us Elevation Individual and Family Therapy is a rapidly growing multi-location mental health organization serving clients throughout Illinois and Indiana. We are passionate about building an organization that delivers exceptional care while operating with excellence behind the scenes. We are looking for an experienced Operations & Systems Manager who loves structure, systems, data, and accountability. This is not an administrative assistant position. We need someone who enjoys building processes, organizing teams, tracking performance, and making businesses run better. If you naturally think, "There has to be a better way to do this," you'll probably love this role. --- # About the Role Our CEO is highly visionary and growth-focused. Your role is to translate vision into execution. You will build systems, organize projects, hold leaders accountable, monitor KPIs, create dashboards, facilitate meetings, and ensure initiatives move from ideas to completion. You will become the operational hub of the company. --- # What You'll Be Responsible For ### Operational Leadership * Build and improve operational systems * Document and improve workflows * Create Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) * Identify inefficiencies and recommend solutions * Improve communication across departments * Ensure projects are completed on time ### KPI Development & Reporting You will build executive dashboards that track the health of the company. Examples include: * Revenue * Collections * Accounts Receivable * Therapist productivity * Documentation compliance * Scheduling utilization * Client satisfaction * Referral sources * Administrative performance * Hiring metrics * Credentialing progress * Marketing performance * Financial trends You'll create reports that allow leadership to quickly understand what is happening across the business. --- ### Dashboard Creation You'll build dashboards using tools like: * Airtable * Monday.com * ClickUp * Google Sheets * Excel * Looker Studio * Power BI (preferred) You should enjoy turning messy data into simple visual reports. --- ### Meeting Leadership You will: * Run weekly leadership meetings * Create agendas * Capture action items * Assign ownership * Follow up on commitments * Keep projects moving * Ensure accountability You are comfortable respectfully asking leaders for updates and helping them stay on track. --- ### Project Management You'll oversee multiple projects simultaneously such as: * New service launches * Software implementation * Process improvements * Hiring initiatives * Operational changes * Technology rollouts * Workflow redesign * Cross-department initiatives Nothing should "fall through the cracks." --- ### Data & Analytics You should enjoy working with numbers. Responsibilities include: * Tracking trends * Building reports * Identifying operational bottlenecks * Finding opportunities for improvement * Making recommendations backed by data --- ### Process Improvement You'll constantly ask questions like: * Can this be automated? * Can this process be simplified? * Can we reduce manual work? * Can this dashboard update automatically? * Can this report be easier to understand? Continuous improvement is expected. --- ### Executive Support You'll work closely with the CEO by: * Organizing priorities * Following up on projects * Preparing reports * Monitoring company goals * Keeping initiatives moving * Reducing decision fatigue * Creating structure around growth Your success will allow the CEO to spend less time managing operations and more time growing the business. --- # Required Skills * Excellent English communication * Exceptional organization * Strong project management * Advanced Excel or Google Sheets * Dashboard creation * KPI reporting * Process documentation * Meeting facilitation * Strong written communication * Excellent follow-through * Critical thinking * Time management * High attention to detail --- # Preferred Experience Experience with one or more of the following: * Airtable * Monday.com * ClickUp * Asana * Notion * Microsoft Excel * Google Workspace * Power BI * Looker Studio * Zapier * Make.com * AI tools such as ChatGPT Experience supporting founders or CEOs is a significant plus. --- # The Ideal Person You are someone who: * Loves structure * Loves organization * Enjoys creating systems * Notices details others miss * Naturally follows up with people * Thinks several steps ahead * Is comfortable leading meetings * Can respectfully hold people accountable * Enjoys solving operational problems * Is proactive instead of reactive * Doesn't wait to be told what to do * Takes ownership --- # To Apply (Required) **Applications that do not include ALL of the items below will not be considered.** Please submit: 1. Your resume. 2. A brief introduction about yourself. 3. **Screenshots or examples of dashboards you personally built.** 4. **A list of KPIs you have created or managed.** 5. A list of the software you have used (Airtable, ClickUp, Monday.com, Power BI, Excel, Google Sheets, Looker Studio, etc.). 6. Include the phrase **"Systems Drive Success"** as the first line of your application so we know you read the entire job posting. last_week_candidates.summary: Title: Remote Systems & Automations Manager (Airtable & AI Automations Focused) Schedule: 9 am- 5 pm EET (GREECE time zone) Hours: 40-45 Hours Rate of Pay: $1,920 - $2,400 a month ($12-15/hr) This role will begin by auditing and strengthening the business’s...
last_week_candidates.full_description: Title: Remote Systems & Automations Manager (Airtable & AI Automations Focused) Schedule: 9 am- 5 pm EET (GREECE time zone) Hours: 40-45 Hours Rate of Pay: $1,920 - $2,400 a month ($12-15/hr) This role will begin by auditing and strengthening the business’s internal technical ecosystem, with a focus on creating a robust customer funnel tracking system from awareness to sales. Once that foundation is in place, the role will expand into building a client-facing platform that allows our clients to track their own business inputs and outputs, supported by dashboards, AI tools, trainings, and strategic resources Self Made is a premier global business consultancy and transformation platform dedicated to building a new generation of successful female entrepreneurs. We provide established female founders and service-based business owners with a strategic roadmap combined with modern marketing strategy, tool integration, and community resources to create true leverage, profitability, and operational freedom. Our comprehensive approach explicitly addresses both technical growth requirements and the deeper professional confidence challenges that arise during business scaling. Guided by an absolute commitment to excellence in execution, we exist to help brilliant women combine their lifelong expertise with contemporary rules of visibility to achieve wealth and impact on their own terms Accountability: Phase 1 *Technical ecosystem audit - Review the full business tech stack across CRM, email, payments, forms, automations, analytics, content platforms, and Airtable - Map how leads currently move from awareness to enquiry to sale - Identify data gaps, broken handoffs, duplicate tools, and manual workarounds - Assess which systems are reliable enough to keep and which need replacing or restructuring - Document the current-state architecture in a way that is clear and usable *Funnel tracking and measurement - Build a robust way to track the customer journey from awareness through to conversion - Define the key funnel stages and what each one means in your business - Establish the core metrics to measure at each stage - Create logic for tracking lead source, conversion points, sales activity, and customer movement - Make sure the data can be viewed consistently and updated accurately *Systems integration and data structure - Connect the key systems needed to support clean funnel visibility - Improve how Airtable is used as a source of truth where relevant - Consolidate fragmented data from Stripe, School, and Kit into a single Airtable relational database, establishing a unified Source of Truth with zero duplicate records within the first 30 days. - Ensure data flows correctly between tools and is structured for long-term use - Reduce fragmentation across platforms - Create a setup that can later support a client-facing dashboard *Operational visibility and reporting - Build internal reporting views that allow you to clearly see business performance - Create dashboards or views for sales pipeline, leads, content performance, and conversion trends - Make reporting practical and decision-focused, not just data-heavy - Ensure reporting supports fast insight into what is and is not working *Documentation and implementation standards - Document the systems, workflows, tracking logic, and definitions - Create SOPs for ongoing maintenance and team use - Establish standards for naming, permissions, and data hygiene - Build the setup so it can be maintained and expanded over time Phase 2: *Client platform design - Translate the internal system into a client-facing experience - Design how clients will track both input and output in their business - Structure a performance dashboard so it is simple, strategic, and useful - Ensure the platform helps clients understand performance and take action *Client business tracking framework - Build a model clients can use to track their own awareness, leads, sales activity, and growth - Define which inputs they should monitor, such as content, outreach, offers, and sales actions - Define which outputs they should monitor, such as leads, inbound requests, calls booked, deals closed, and revenue - Make sure the framework is easy to use and relevant for coaching clients *AI and strategic tools integration - Integrate useful AI-supported tools into the client experience - Build access to competitor research workflows - Include transcription and summary features for content and learning - Create access to custom GPTs or guided AI tools for idea development and execution support - Ensure AI tools are practical, safe, and well-structured for client use *Training and guided implementation - Link the dashboard experience to trainings, resources, and strategic guidance - Build a systemised checklist approach to business building inside the platform - Make sure clients know what to do next based on their current business data - Connect education to execution so the platform drives action, not just insight *Events and client engagement - Build a calendar view for upcoming events, trainings, and key touchpoints - Make the platform feel like an active business-growth environment rather than a static portal - Support client engagement through visibility, reminders, and structured planning *Scale, quality, and long-term platform ownership - Ensure the platform is built for long-term use, not quick fixes - Create a permissions structure that protects client data appropriately - Maintain data quality, usability, and reliability as the platform grows - Identify future improvements and help shape the long-term product roadmap - Design and execute a production-ready client interface through reliable API/Zapier schemas engineered to support 100–500 active concurrent users without system lag or handoff breakage. Tasks: *Review and optimise our systems daily to ensure the customer journey from awareness to sale is clear, effective, and scalable. *Track and report on key business metrics, turning data into clear insights and actionable recommendations. *Build and maintain the operational infrastructure of the business, including Airtable, automations, integrations, and SOPs. *Approach problems with clear structure and strategic thinking, turning ideas and gaps into practical solutions *Communicate progress through daily updates, keeping the founder informed on wins, issues, priorities, and next actions. Expectations: *3+ years in operations, systems, product operations, business intelligence, or digital product implementation *Hands-on experience with Airtable and connected tools *Experience setting up or improving reporting dashboards and data flows *Experience building or managing automations and integrations *Experience documenting processes and creating scalable workflows *Experience giving clear updates, recommendations, and next steps to a founder or senior decision-maker *Experience building robust, scalable digital platforms for long-term use, with a clear understanding of clean system architecture, reliability, and user experience at scale. Must be able to create proper production-ready systems rather than quick, patchwork, or vibe-coded solutions, with the ability to support at least 100 active users. *Must be highly detail-oriented and take pride in excellence of execution, with a consistent ability to deliver clean, accurate, high-quality work to a very high standard. Secret Code = DHOPS0626 *Must be highly self-motivated, take initiative, and work with a high level of independence and should be able to understand the wider vision, think proactively, and bring ideas, improvements, and solutions to the table. Salary: Position & Length: Contractor (Remote) 1-Year (12 months) Rate of Pay: $12-$15 USD Scheduled Hours Minimum: 40 hours (Must Track Hours) Scheduled Hours Maximum: 45 hours (Anything above needs approval) Agreed Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9 AM–5 PM ETT GREECE Pay Schedule: Monthly via Wise or preferred method With the submission of hours worked 13th Month Pay Bonus? Yes, performance based metrics TDB at 90 Day evaluation *Application Criteria: Subject Line Please add: SAM Please have an ID score of 70+ Please provide the secret code in the message Application Deadline: July 3rd, 2026

last_week_candidates.title: Expert Meta Ads Manager & AI Creative Specialist (24 hrs/wk ? Full-Time)
last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: Content Creation Facebook Ads Meta Business Suite
last_week_candidates.summary: About Us We're brand architects. Not decorators. Our agency was built for the founders who'd rather be unforgettable than agreeable. Cinematic, declarative, certain — we architect names people repeat. We deliver full-funnel Meta ad campaigns built to drive...
last_week_candidates.full_description: About Us We're brand architects. Not decorators. Our agency was built for the founders who'd rather be unforgettable than agreeable. Cinematic, declarative, certain — we architect names people repeat. We deliver full-funnel Meta ad campaigns built to drive measurable revenue, fix website conversions, build unbreakable brand systems, and design scroll-stopping creatives. Our numbers since 2025 speak for themselves: 2,158 campaigns created $4.8M+ generated revenue for clients +47 founders rearchitected 4.9/5 rated by our clients The Role We are looking for a highly skilled Meta Ads & Creative Expert to join our team. You aren't just a media buyer, and you aren't just a designer. You are a hybrid talent who understands how to build profitable Meta campaigns from the ground up and how to generate the high-converting, AI-driven creatives that fuel them. Currently, this role is 24 hours per week, but we are growing fast. We expect this to scale into a full-time position soon, so you must be open and available for increased hours in the near future. Required Skills & Experience To thrive in this role, you must be: An Expert in Meta Ads Management: You know the Business Manager inside and out, understand scaling strategies, and build campaigns that drive actual revenue. An Expert in AI Image Generation: You know how to prompt, iterate, and produce stunning, photorealistic, or highly stylized AI imagery tailored for advertising. An Expert in Meta Ad Creative Design: You understand the anatomy of a scroll-stopping ad. You know how to combine AI imagery, compelling copy, and strong design principles. Fluent in English: Clear, concise, and professional communication is non-negotiable. What We Offer Flexible Payouts: Choose between weekly or monthly payments. Competitive Pay: Your hourly rate will be based strictly on your experience and the quality of your portfolio. Top-Tier Tech Stack Provided: We give you the keys to the best tools on the market. You will get full access to Canva, CapCut, Google Gemini, Lovable AI, Claude, and more. Massive Growth Potential: We are expanding rapidly. As we grow, new job titles are being created. If you prove yourself, you will be first in line for a promotion to a Manager role. ?? How to Apply (Read Carefully) ?? We only hire top talent, and we expect high attention to detail. To apply, you must include a link to your portfolio showcasing your previous work (Meta Ads results, AI-generated images, and ad creative designs). Note: Applications submitted without a valid portfolio link will be declined immediately. If you have what it takes to build campaigns that convert and design creatives that stop the scroll, we want to hear from you. Apply now.

last_week_candidates.title: Funnelish Funnel Builder (Project-Based) – Health & Beauty E-commerce
last_week_candidates.summary: About us We run two growing health & beauty e-commerce brands (UK + AUS) — driving traffic through Meta Ads to advertorial funnels built on Funnelish, with checkout on Shopify. We're a small, fast-moving team and we're looking for a reliable Funnelish builder...
last_week_candidates.full_description: About us We run two growing health & beauty e-commerce brands (UK + AUS) — driving traffic through Meta Ads to advertorial funnels built on Funnelish, with checkout on Shopify. We're a small, fast-moving team and we're looking for a reliable Funnelish builder to join us on a per-project basis, with the possibility of ongoing work if it's a good fit. What you'll be doing - Build advertorial and sales funnels in Funnelish based on provided copy, images, and creative briefs - Customize funnel pages using HTML/CSS where Funnelish's native blocks aren't enough (custom layouts, styling tweaks, embeds) - Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to help generate or refine page copy and images where needed - Set up funnel pages to match brand specs (UK or AU, depending on the project) - Connect funnels correctly to Shopify products, checkout, and CTA links - Implement tracking pixels correctly (we use wetracked.io) - Follow our delivery checklists and SOPs closely - Test funnels end-to-end before handover (links, pixels, mobile responsiveness, page speed) - Communicate clearly on progress and flag issues or blockers early - Make revisions based on feedback (creative, copy, or structural changes) What we're looking for - Proven experience building funnels in Funnelish (please share examples/portfolio) - Experience in health & beauty or supplements e-commerce is a must - Strong HTML/CSS coding skills — comfortable writing and editing custom code blocks, not just using drag-and-drop elements - Hands-on experience using Claude and/or ChatGPT for generating/editing text and images is a must - Solid understanding of Shopify integration (products, checkout, cart links) - Experience with Meta Ads pixel setup and tracking (wetracked.io experience is a plus) - Able to work independently from a brief/checklist without heavy hand-holding - Strong attention to detail — broken links or missing pixels cost us money - Comfortable with async communication via ClickUp - Good written English Nice to have - Familiarity with advertorial-style funnels (long-form story-to-offer pages) - Basic JavaScript knowledge (for custom interactions/timers/popups) - Basic understanding of Meta ad compliance (claims, restricted content) How we work - Tasks assigned and tracked via ClickUp - SOPs and brand assets provided via Google Drive - Paid per project/funnel (rate to be discussed based on complexity) - Clear deadlines, clear feedback — we tell you exactly what we need To apply Please send: - Your Funnelish portfolio or 2–3 example funnels you've built - A code sample or screenshot of a custom HTML/CSS element you built in a funnel - An example of text or image content you've created/edited using Claude or ChatGPT - Your experience with health & beauty or supplement products - Your typical turnaround time per funnel - Your rate per funnel (or hourly, if you prefer)

last_week_candidates.title: Operations Coordinator (AI-Driven Project & Task Management)
last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: Operation Management AI Tools Team Leadership
last_week_candidates.summary: KeepUpMedia is a North American marketing agency for premium medical clinics. We move fast, run lean, and live in Slack, WhatsApp, and Asana. I'm hiring an Operations Coordinator to be the person who makes sure nothing we say we'll do ever slips through the...
last_week_candidates.full_description: KeepUpMedia is a North American marketing agency for premium medical clinics. We move fast, run lean, and live in Slack, WhatsApp, and Asana. I'm hiring an Operations Coordinator to be the person who makes sure nothing we say we'll do ever slips through the cracks. This is a remote, fully text-based role. Most days are about 1 hour of work; the busiest days cap at 3. The only call involved is a weekly check-in with me. If you're sharp, reliable, and obsessed with getting things across the finish line, this is a long-term growth seat — you start hourly and earn more scope and pay as you prove yourself. WHAT YOU'LL DO - Live inside our Slack channels and WhatsApp group chats and catch every task, request, or commitment the moment it comes up. - Log each task in Asana and assign it to the right owner across our team boards. - Confirm the task with the owner, then drive it to completion ON TIME. Following up, nudging, and escalating to me when something is stuck is the core of this job — not just logging tasks. - Take tasks directly from me and run them through the same pipeline. - Turn meeting transcripts (auto-generated via Fathom) into clear action items using Claude, then assign and track them. - Own new-hire onboarding: when we bring on a new editor or team member, make sure they receive every SOP, then check in regularly so they always have what they need to move work forward. - Send me one short weekly summary: what came in, where it went, and what's at risk. YOU MUST HAVE - Exceptional English — near-native, neutral accent. You'll communicate with North American teammates every day, in writing and on calls. If your spoken English has a noticeable accent, this is not the right role for you. This is non-negotiable. - Deep, daily AI fluency. You already use Claude heavily — if you don't, please don't apply. Experience with Claude MCP connections is the single most important skill for this role; mention it specifically. - Hands-on experience with Asana (essential), plus Slack and WhatsApp. ClickUp and Monday.com experience is a strong plus. - A real track record of being organized, proactive, and relentless about deadlines. - Genuine hunger to grow with a company long-term. BONUS POINTS - Agency or marketing-team experience. - Comfort building or running simple automations (Zapier, webhooks). - You've owned a task or project pipeline before and can point to proof. THE SETUP - Part-time, roughly 10–15 hours/week, remote, fully async except one weekly check-in with me. - $5/hour to start, with bonuses & clear room to grow in "pay" and "responsibility." TO APPLY Start your message with the word "KeepUpMedia" so I know you read this in full. Then tell me: (1) how you use Claude day to day, (2) your experience with MCP connections, and (3) one example of a time you drove a messy set of tasks to completion on time.

last_week_candidates.full_description: Virtual Executive Assistant to the CEO Part-Time and Full-Time Opportunities Available About the Role Brand M3dia is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Virtual Executive Assistant to support our CEO in managing day-to-day operations, communications, and strategic initiatives. As a company specializing in interactive kiosks, custom software solutions, AI-powered technologies, digital signage, and robotics, we are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can leverage modern technology to improve efficiency and productivity. Key Responsibilities Calendar Management Schedule, coordinate, and manage the CEO's appointments, meetings, and commitments. Ensure optimal use of the CEO's time and maintain an organized calendar. Communication Management Manage incoming and outgoing communications, including emails, phone calls, LinkedIn messages, and social media inquiries. Draft professional correspondence on behalf of the CEO when required. Staff Coordination Communicate with team members on behalf of the CEO. Delegate tasks as directed, follow up on deliverables, and ensure accountability. Document & Presentation Preparation Create, edit, proofread, and organize reports, presentations, proposals, and business documents. Ensure all materials meet company standards and executive expectations. Meeting Support Prepare agendas, reports, and supporting documents. Take notes, track action items, and ensure follow-up on commitments. Travel Coordination Arrange domestic and international travel, accommodations, transportation, and itineraries. Project Assistance Conduct research, gather data, summarize findings, and prepare recommendations to support executive decision-making. Assist with special projects and operational initiatives. Expense Management Track expenses and organize receipts. Prepare expense reports and ensure accurate documentation. AI & Technology Support Utilize AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Otter.ai, and similar platforms to improve productivity and streamline workflows. Assist with AI-powered research, content drafting, meeting summaries, process documentation, and automation initiatives. Stay current with emerging AI technologies and recommend ways to improve operational efficiency. Qualifications Required Proven experience as a Virtual Executive Assistant, Executive Assistant, Operations Coordinator, or similar role supporting senior leadership or C-level executives. Excellent organizational and time management skills. Strong written and verbal English communication skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision. High level of professionalism and discretion when handling confidential information. Strong attention to detail and follow-through. Technical Skills Experience using productivity and collaboration tools such as: Zoho Basecamp Calendly Otter.ai ScribeHow Google Workspace Microsoft Office Suite Project management tools AI Experience (Preferred) Experience using AI tools for business productivity, research, writing assistance, meeting management, workflow automation, or administrative support. last_week_candidates.full_description: Virtual Executive Assistant to the CEO Part-Time and Full-Time Opportunities Available About the Role Brand M3dia is seeking a highly organized, proactive, and tech-savvy Virtual Executive Assistant to support our CEO in managing day-to-day operations, communications, and strategic initiatives. As a company specializing in interactive kiosks, custom software solutions, AI-powered technologies, digital signage, and robotics, we are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can leverage modern technology to improve efficiency and productivity. Key Responsibilities Calendar Management Schedule, coordinate, and manage the CEO's appointments, meetings, and commitments. Ensure optimal use of the CEO's time and maintain an organized calendar. Communication Management Manage incoming and outgoing communications, including emails, phone calls, LinkedIn messages, and social media inquiries. Draft professional correspondence on behalf of the CEO when required. Staff Coordination Communicate with team members on behalf of the CEO. Delegate tasks as directed, follow up on deliverables, and ensure accountability. Document & Presentation Preparation Create, edit, proofread, and organize reports, presentations, proposals, and business documents. Ensure all materials meet company standards and executive expectations. Meeting Support Prepare agendas, reports, and supporting documents. Take notes, track action items, and ensure follow-up on commitments. Travel Coordination Arrange domestic and international travel, accommodations, transportation, and itineraries. Project Assistance Conduct research, gather data, summarize findings, and prepare recommendations to support executive decision-making. Assist with special projects and operational initiatives. Expense Management Track expenses and organize receipts. Prepare expense reports and ensure accurate documentation. AI & Technology Support Utilize AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Otter.ai, and similar platforms to improve productivity and streamline workflows. Assist with AI-powered research, content drafting, meeting summaries, process documentation, and automation initiatives. Stay current with emerging AI technologies and recommend ways to improve operational efficiency. Qualifications Required Proven experience as a Virtual Executive Assistant, Executive Assistant, Operations Coordinator, or similar role supporting senior leadership or C-level executives. Excellent organizational and time management skills. Strong written and verbal English communication skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision. High level of professionalism and discretion when handling confidential information. Strong attention to detail and follow-through. Technical Skills Experience using productivity and collaboration tools such as: Zoho Basecamp Calendly Otter.ai ScribeHow Google Workspace Microsoft Office Suite Project management tools AI Experience (Preferred) Experience using AI tools for business productivity, research, writing assistance, meeting management, workflow automation, or administrative support. Ability to effectively prompt AI systems and evaluate AI-generated outputs. Familiarity with AI-powered productivity tools is highly desirable. IT experience a huge plus Nice to Have Experience working in technology, software, digital signage, robotics, AI, or related industries. Project coordination or operations experience. Experience supporting founders, executives, or entrepreneurs in fast-growth companies. Working Conditions Remote position. Main working hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Canada). Must have a reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace. Must have access to a computer capable of supporting modern business applications. Flexibility to accommodate urgent requests outside standard business hours when necessary. What We Offer Competitive compensation based on experience. Performance-based bonuses and incentives. Opportunity to work directly with an innovative CEO and leadership team. Exposure to cutting-edge projects involving AI, digital signage, interactive kiosks, software development, and robotics. Long-term growth opportunities within a rapidly expanding technology company. Application Process Interested candidates should submit: Updated Resume/CV Cover Letter References Relevant Work Samples (if applicable) A short 1-minute video introduction telling us about yourself, your relevant experience, and why you're interested in joining Brand M3dia. Please also indicate: Your experience supporting executives or business owners. Your experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Otter.ai, etc.). Applications that do not include "BRAND M3DIA" at the beginning may not be considered for the next stage of the hiring process. Brand M3dia is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes candidates from all backgrounds to apply. Website: www.BrandM3dia.com

last_week_candidates.title: CRM ARCHITECT & INTELLIGENCE NETWORK ENGINEER
last_week_candidates.skill_requirement: CRM Marketing Automation Web Design & Page Layout
last_week_candidates.summary: ABOUT THE BRAND TheUnderShadow.com is the official home of the UnderShadow Universe — a creator-owned intellectual property ecosystem encompassing published novels, branded merchandise (APEX Apparel line), a board game in development, collectibles, future...
last_week_candidates.full_description: ABOUT THE BRAND TheUnderShadow.com is the official home of the UnderShadow Universe — a creator-owned intellectual property ecosystem encompassing published novels, branded merchandise (APEX Apparel line), a board game in development, collectibles, future gaming apps, and planned film/television licensing. The brand is authored under the pen name 'A Hardly Scene' (formerly JS Henderson) and currently operates three published novels, a live TikTok Shop with 773 staged SKUs, and a Wix-powered website. The UnderShadow Universe is not a standard retail brand. It is a universe-centric experience brand. Its CRM is not a marketing tool — it is the central operating system for every relationship across every division of the ecosystem. The most critical framing principle: this CRM is called the UnderShadow Intelligence Network. Subscribers are Assets. Customer accounts are Operative Profiles. Rewards are Clearance Levels. The contractor hired for this role must understand and maintain this brand language in every automation, every segment name, every tag, and every customer-facing communication. POSITION OVERVIEW We are seeking a highly skilled CRM Architect with demonstrated Klaviyo expertise to design, build, and manage the UnderShadow Intelligence Network — a comprehensive, multi-segment customer lifecycle ecosystem built on Klaviyo and integrated with our Wix storefront, TikTok Shop, and SMS platform. This is a project-based engagement structured in seven phases. Phases 1 through 3 represent the core build (estimated 3–4 months). Phases 4 through 7 represent ongoing optimization, loyalty infrastructure, and data architecture, with the option to convert to a retained monthly engagement upon successful completion of Phase 3. This role requires a self-directed professional who can take a written architecture specification and translate it into a fully functioning, enterprise-grade Klaviyo ecosystem — independently, on schedule, and with zero hand-holding on platform mechanics. PLATFORM STACK (REQUIRED PROFICIENCY) • Klaviyo (Primary CRM/Email/SMS Platform) — 2+ years required • Wix (Website Platform) — Wix-Klaviyo integration experience required • TikTok Shop — understanding of TikTok Shop data flows and customer data limitations • SMS Platform — Klaviyo SMS, Postscript, or equivalent (platform to be jointly selected in Phase 1) • Loyalty Platform — Smile.io, LoyaltyLion, or equivalent (platform to be jointly selected in Phase 4) • Affiliate Tracking — Refersion, Impact, LeadDyno, or equivalent (platform to be jointly selected in Phase 3) • Google Analytics / Wix Analytics — for dashboard data sourcing • Email deliverability tools — MxToolbox, GlockApps, or equivalent for monitoring THE SEVEN-PHASE BUILD SCOPE PHASE 1 — PLATFORM FOUNDATION & INFRASTRUCTURE Deliverables: • Klaviyo account audit (or initial setup if new): verify sending domain, list health, and existing flows • Email deliverability infrastructure: configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records for the sending domain (undershadow.com or designated subdomain). Verify authentication passes MX record check. • Dedicated sending domain warm-up: execute a 4–6 week IP/domain warm-up protocol before any high-volume sending begins. • Wix-Klaviyo integration: configure all native Wix event triggers (purchase, cart abandonment, account creation, form submission) to pass correctly into Klaviyo. • TikTok Shop data bridge: identify and implement the method for capturing TikTok Shop customer data into Klaviyo. (Note: TikTok does not share customer emails natively — solution may include Wix post-purchase redirect, order confirmation email capture, or third-party connector.) • SMS platform selection and setup: evaluate Klaviyo SMS vs. Postscript for brand needs; configure opt-in compliance, short code or toll-free number, and CAN-SPAM/CTIA compliance. • Master segment and tag architecture: configure all 19 customer tags listed in the segment taxonomy below, using the Intelligence Network naming convention. • List import and segmentation: import any existing subscriber list; apply appropriate tags; remove invalid/hard-bounced addresses; establish baseline deliverability metrics. • Naming convention documentation: deliver a written Klaviyo Naming Convention Guide covering all flow names, segment names, tag names, custom properties, and metric names — all using Intelligence Network brand language. Phase 1 Acceptance Criteria: • SPF, DKIM, DMARC all passing on sending domain verification tools • Klaviyo integration test: minimum 5 Wix events (purchase, cart abandon, form submit, account create, page view) confirmed passing data into Klaviyo correctly • All 19 master tags configured in Klaviyo • Naming Convention Guide delivered and founder-approved • Zero emails sent to the list before warm-up protocol begins PHASE 2 — FUNNEL ARCHITECTURE & LEAD CAPTURE ECOSYSTEM Build six independent capture funnels, each feeding a separate Klaviyo list/segment. Each funnel requires: opt-in form (Wix), lead magnet or offer delivery (if applicable), welcome sequence (minimum 3 emails), and tag assignment on entry. Funnel 1 — The UnderShadow Collective (Apparel) Entry offer: 15% first order discount. Welcome sequence: brand story, bestselling items, style guide. Funnel 2 — Intelligence Network Entry (Novels) Entry offer: Free sample chapter download. Welcome sequence: author introduction, universe overview, book order links, reading community invitation. Funnel 3 — Playtest Program (Board Game) Entry offer: Join the board game playtest waitlist. Welcome sequence: game reveal, mechanics teaser, playtest application form. Funnel 4 — Insider Intel (Weekly Briefing) Entry: opt-in for weekly UnderShadow briefing. Welcome sequence: what to expect, first briefing, community links. Funnel 5 — Collector Access (Limited Releases) Entry: opt-in for limited edition alerts. Welcome sequence: collector philosophy, what's coming, Clearance Level introduction. Funnel 6 — Creator Program (Affiliate Recruitment) Entry: affiliate application. Welcome sequence: commission structure, brand guidelines, affiliate portal access, content kit delivery. Phase 2 Acceptance Criteria: • All 6 funnels live and testable on theundershadow.com • All 6 welcome sequences built, tested, and founder-approved before activation • Lead magnet delivery automated for Funnels 2, 3, 5, and 6 • All Wix opt-in forms mobile-responsive and tested on iOS and Android PHASE 3 — FULL AUTOMATION TRIGGER BUILD (110 TRIGGERS) Build the complete 110-trigger automation ecosystem. The 40 existing email templates will be provided at project start. The contractor is responsible for: (a) implementing all 40 existing templates as Klaviyo flows, (b) identifying and flagging any triggers requiring new copy, and (c) building all flows to production-ready status pending founder copy approval. The contractor does NOT write email copy — the founder writes or approves all copy. The contractor builds, tests, and deploys flows. LEAD ACQUISITION (Triggers 41–50) 41. Newsletter Signup 42. Free Chapter Download 43. Character Guide Download 44. Universe Lore Download 45. Cart Started 46. Wishlist Created 47. Account Created 48. SMS Opt-In 49. Contest Entry 50. Referral Program Registration CUSTOMER NURTURE (Triggers 51–60) 51. 7 Days No Purchase 52. 30 Days No Purchase 53. 60 Days No Purchase 54. 90 Days No Purchase 55. Browsed Product Multiple Times 56. Viewed Same Product 5+ Times 57. Category Affinity Trigger 58. Book Interest Trigger 59. Board Game Interest Trigger 60. Apparel Interest Trigger CART RECOVERY (Triggers 61–65) 61. 1 Hour Cart Abandonment 62. 24 Hour Cart Abandonment 63. 48 Hour Cart Abandonment 64. 72 Hour Cart Abandonment 65. High Value Cart Abandonment (Cart Value > $75) POST-PURCHASE (Triggers 66–75) 66. Order Thank You 67. Shipping Confirmation 68. Delivery Confirmation 69. Product Education 70. Apparel Care Instructions 71. Review Request 72. User-Generated Content Request 73. Replenishment Reminder 74. VIP Upgrade Invitation 75. Referral Invitation COMMUNITY (Triggers 76–85) 76. Discord Invitation 77. Community Welcome 78. Creator Spotlight 79. Fan Feature 80. Collector Spotlight 81. Tournament Announcement 82. New Character Reveal 83. Lore Expansion Release 84. Board Game Update 85. App Development Update VIP (Triggers 86–95) 86. VIP Enrollment 87. VIP Tier Upgrade 88. Exclusive Release Access 89. Private Sale Invitation 90. Birthday Campaign 91. Anniversary Campaign 92. Early Access Product Drop 93. Limited Edition Alert 94. Collector Series Launch 95. Founders Circle Invitation WHOLESALE (Triggers 96–100) 96. Wholesale Inquiry 97. Wholesale Approval 98. Wholesale Follow-Up 99. Bulk Order Proposal 100. Distributor Outreach LICENSING (Triggers 101–105) 101. Film Rights Inquiry 102. Television Rights Inquiry 103. Publishing Partnership Inquiry 104. Merchandise Licensing Inquiry 105. International Licensing Inquiry AFFILIATE (Triggers 106–110) 106. Affiliate Application 107. Affiliate Approval 108. Affiliate Performance Review 109. Affiliate Reactivation 110. Top Affiliate Recognition Phase 3 Acceptance Criteria: • All 110 flows built and in 'Review' status in Klaviyo • Each flow tested with simulated contact data to confirm correct trigger firing • Founder has reviewed and approved all copy before any flow is set to 'Live' • No flow sends to actual subscribers until founder approval is documented • Affiliate platform integrated and tracking confirmed on triggers 106–110 PHASE 4 — UNDERSHADOW CLEARANCE LEVELS LOYALTY PROGRAM Implement the UnderShadow Clearance Levels loyalty program — a thematic, 8-tier rewards architecture that replaces standard 'points' language with Intelligence Network nomenclature. Clearance Level Designation Qualification Criteria Level 1 Civilian Entry — account creation or first opt-in Level 2 Observer First email open or site visit post-subscribe Level 3 Informant First purchase or social share Level 4 Operative Second purchase or affiliate referral Level 5 Field Agent Third purchase or UGC submission Level 6 Handler Collector status or wholesale inquiry Level 7 Director VIP enrollment threshold (spend or engagement-based) Level 8 Shadow Council Founders Circle / Lifetime Ecosystem Member Phase 4 Deliverables: • Loyalty platform selection (Smile.io recommended for Wix compatibility) and installation • 8-level tier structure configured with Intelligence Network level names and criteria • Benefits matrix defined per level (to be specified by founder): exclusive content, early access, discounts, physical rewards, event invitations • Clearance Level progression triggers built in Klaviyo: email sent upon each tier upgrade • Clearance Level displayed in Operative Profile (customer account dashboard on Wix) PHASE 5 — INTELLIGENCE NETWORK BRAND ARCHITECTURE IMPLEMENTATION Implement the Intelligence Network brand language across every customer-facing CRM touchpoint. Standard Language Intelligence Network Language Implementation Location Standard Language Intelligence Network Language Implementation Location Subscribe to our newsletter Enter the UnderShadow Intelligence Network All opt-in forms, pop-ups, CTAs Customer Account Operative Profile Wix account dashboard, email references Rewards / Points Clearance Level Loyalty platform, all emails, Wix dashboard Member Asset Membership references, community communications Order Confirmation Mission Confirmation Post-purchase email subject lines Shipping Update Field Dispatch Report Shipping confirmation email subject lines Exclusive Access Classified Access Granted VIP and limited release communications Newsletter Intel Brief Weekly briefing communications Community The Network Discord invitations, community email references PHASE 6 — EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD CONFIGURATION Configure the following metrics tracking in Klaviyo and supplementary analytics tools: • DAILY: Total revenue (CRM-attributed), orders, new leads captured, email opt-ins, SMS opt-ins • WEEKLY: Returning customer rate, cart recovery rate, top 5 products by revenue, top 3 traffic sources, active automation performance summary • MONTHLY: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) by segment, repeat purchase rate, email revenue, SMS revenue, affiliate revenue, TikTok Shop revenue (via bridge), Clearance Level distribution across the list, list growth rate • Deliverable: A written Dashboard Access Guide showing the founder how to view each metric independently, without relying on the contractor for routine reporting. PHASE 7 — CUSTOMER DATA WAREHOUSE & ONGOING OPTIMIZATION Build and maintain the UnderShadow Customer Data Warehouse — a comprehensive Operative Profile for every contact, containing all data fields specified below. Implement ongoing A/B testing, list hygiene, and performance optimization. Operative Profile Data Fields (Klaviyo Custom Properties): • Full Name • Email Address • Phone / SMS Number • Purchase History (all transactions) • Favorite Characters • Favorite Product Categories • Favorite Faction • Board Game Interest (Y/N) • Book Interest (Y/N) • Collector Status • VIP / Clearance Level • Affiliate Status • Wholesale Account Status • Licensing Interest • Lifetime Spend Value • Engagement Score • Last Activity Date • Predicted Next Purchase Category • Acquisition Source • Prison Outreach Flag (handled via postal — no automated email sequences) Ongoing Phase 7 Deliverables (Monthly): • A/B test 2 subject lines per major flow per month; report results and implement winner • List hygiene: suppress unengaged contacts (90+ days no open) into sunset segment; run re-engagement flow before final suppression • Deliverability monitoring: review spam complaint rate, bounce rate, unsubscribe rate monthly • Flow performance report: delivered to founder monthly — open rate, CTR, revenue per recipient, conversion rate per flow • Clearance Level advancement reporting: how many contacts advanced tiers this month ? MASTER CUSTOMER SEGMENT TAXONOMY (19 SEGMENTS) Every contact in Klaviyo must be tagged with the appropriate segment(s). Contacts may carry multiple tags simultaneously. All tag names use Intelligence Network language. Segment Tag Name Definition / Qualification Criteria Apparel Asset Purchased clothing or merchandise from the APEX line Book Reader Purchased or downloaded a novel Board Game Prospect Requested board game information or joined playtest waitlist Collector Purchased limited edition, premium, or collector-tier items UnderShadow Fan Engaged with universe content (lore, characters) without purchasing TikTok Shop Buyer Made a purchase through TikTok Shop (bridged into Klaviyo) Affiliate Asset Active affiliate promoting the brand Wholesale Prospect Submitted wholesale inquiry Wholesale Account Approved and active wholesale buyer Licensing Prospect Inquired about film, TV, publishing, merchandise, or international licensing Influencer Partner Social reach partner with active collaboration Event Attendee Attended or registered for an UnderShadow event Film/TV Prospect Expressed interest in media adaptations Email Asset Email subscriber — no purchase yet VIP / Clearance Level 6+ Handler, Director, or Shadow Council tier Prison Outreach Contact Books-to-Prisoners program — postal communication only Founders Circle Shadow Council / Level 8 — highest-tier lifetime member Creator Program Applied to or enrolled in affiliate/creator program Inactive Asset No engagement in 90+ days — in sunset flow COMPENSATION STRUCTURE COMPENSATION NOTE: The scope of this engagement — 7 phases covering 110 automation triggers, 6 funnels, an 8-tier loyalty program, a brand architecture implementation, an executive dashboard, and an ongoing data warehouse — requires structured milestone-based compensation, not a flat hourly rate with a weekly hour cap. Phase Scope Payment Trigger Compensation Phase 1 Platform Foundation & Infrastructure Upon acceptance of Phase 1 criteria Negotiated milestone fee Phase 2 Funnel Architecture (6 funnels) Upon all 6 funnels live and tested Negotiated milestone fee Phase 3 Full 110-Trigger Automation Build Upon all 110 flows in Review status Negotiated milestone fee Phase 4 Loyalty Program Build Upon Clearance Levels live on site Negotiated milestone fee Phase 5 Intelligence Network Brand Implementation Upon all brand language applied Included in Phase 4 milestone Phase 6 Executive Dashboard Upon dashboard delivered with guide Negotiated milestone fee Phase 7 Ongoing Optimization Retainer Monthly, ongoing post-Phase 6 Negotiated monthly retainer Note on Rate Expectations: Qualified Klaviyo CRM architects with Wix and TikTok Shop integration experience in the Philippines typically command $8–$18/hr for this skill set. We are seeking the highest-quality professional within this range. Applicants are encouraged to propose a project-based fee structure per phase in addition to or instead of an hourly rate. We will evaluate proposals on competency first, then cost. REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS • Minimum 2 years of hands-on Klaviyo flow building experience (not Mailchimp, not ActiveCampaign — Klaviyo specifically) • Demonstrated experience building multi-segment B2C email automation ecosystems (portfolio required) • Wix platform experience with Klaviyo integration (or willingness to learn Wix-Klaviyo integration before Phase 1 begins) • Email deliverability fundamentals: must understand SPF, DKIM, DMARC, sender reputation, and bounce management • Experience building eCommerce automation flows: cart abandonment, post-purchase, browse abandonment • Experience configuring audience segments, tags, and custom properties in Klaviyo • Strong written English (B2+ level minimum) — you will name flows, segments, and properties and must implement brand language precisely • Self-directed and deadline-driven — this role has no micromanagement. Phases have defined acceptance criteria. • Availability for weekly 30-minute video check-in with the founder PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS • Klaviyo Product Certification (email or SMS) • Experience with TikTok Shop seller integrations or data connectors • Experience with loyalty platform setup (Smile.io, LoyaltyLion, or similar) • Experience with affiliate tracking platform setup (Refersion, Impact, or similar) • Background in entertainment, publishing, apparel, or creator economy brands • Prior experience building CRM for a universe/lore-based brand (comics, gaming, entertainment) • Klaviyo A/B testing experience with documented open rate improvement results PERFORMANCE KPIs — HOW SUCCESS IS MEASURED Phase KPI Benchmark Phase 1–2 (Foundation) Email open rate > 35% on welcome sequences Industry benchmark: 25–30% Phase 1–2 (Foundation) Click-through rate > 3.5% on promotional flows Industry benchmark: 2.5% Phase 3 (Automation) Cart recovery rate > 10% on 3-step cart abandon sequence Industry benchmark: 5–8% Phase 3 (Automation) Post-purchase review request response rate > 5% Industry benchmark: 2–4% Phase 4 (Loyalty) 20% of purchasers advance to Level 3 (Informant) within 90 days Baseline: to be established Phase 6 (Dashboard) Monthly CRM-attributed revenue tracked and reported Target: 15–25% of total revenue from CRM Phase 7 (Ongoing) List growth: minimum 5% net new subscribers per month via funnel optimization Phase 7 (Ongoing) Deliverability: spam complaint rate < 0.1%; hard bounce rate < 0.5% Gmail bulk sender threshold COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS All automation flows and communications must comply with: • CAN-SPAM Act (15 U.S.C. § 7701 et seq.) — all commercial emails must include physical mailing address, clear unsubscribe mechanism, accurate from name and subject line • GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679) — for any EU-based contacts: explicit consent required, right to erasure must be honored, data processing basis documented • CCPA (California Civil Code § 1798.100 et seq.) — for California contacts: privacy notice, opt-out of data sale, 12-month lookback on data requests • CTIA SMS Guidelines — for all SMS communications: double opt-in required, opt-out keywords honored, message frequency disclosed at opt-in • Prison outreach segment: all communications with Books-to-Prisoners contacts must be postal-first. No automated email sequences. No SMS. This segment is manually managed. WORK PRODUCT OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY All deliverables produced under this engagement — including but not limited to Klaviyo flow architecture, automation logic, segment structures, custom property configurations, naming conventions, email templates, loyalty tier structures, and the Intelligence Network brand framework — are the exclusive intellectual property of the UnderShadow Universe / Vantara Global LLC. The contractor retains no ownership rights over any work product upon payment of agreed compensation. A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is required before project commencement. The contractor will have access to: unreleased character content, upcoming product announcements, wholesale contact data, licensing prospect information, and subscriber data. All such information is strictly confidential and may not be disclosed to any third party during or after the engagement. REPORTING STRUCTURE & COMMUNICATION • Direct report to: Jomo Sekou Henderson, Founder — UnderShadow Universe / Vantara Global LLC • Weekly check-in: 30-minute video call (day/time to be mutually agreed upon at project start) • Communication platform: to be agreed upon (email, Slack, or equivalent) • Phase completion reports: written summary of deliverables completed, any outstanding items, and next-phase kickoff plan — submitted to founder for written approval before next phase billing • Email copy approval: no automation flow goes live without written founder approval of all copy. Contractor submits copy for review via agreed platform; founder has 48-hour review window. • Emergency escalation: for any deliverability emergency (domain blacklist, spam complaint spike), contractor must notify founder within 2 hours of detection APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS To be considered for this engagement, applicants must submit all of the following. Applications missing any element will not be reviewed. 1. A cover letter (minimum 200 words) explaining your specific experience with Klaviyo and why you understand universe-centric brand CRM specifically. 2. Two portfolio examples of multi-segment Klaviyo email ecosystems you have built, including: the client type, the number of flows built, and a screenshot or screen recording of the Klaviyo flow architecture (client name may be redacted). 3. Your proposed project fee structure: either a phase-based milestone proposal or an hourly rate with a phase-by-phase hour estimate. 4. Your Klaviyo certification status (if applicable). 5. Availability: how many hours per week you can dedicate during the Phase 1–3 build period (we recommend minimum 25–35 hours/week during the build phase). 6. One sentence answering this question: What is the difference between a Klaviyo flow and a Klaviyo campaign — and when would you use each? This question (#6) is a qualifying filter. If you cannot answer it in one sentence, this role is not the right fit. BRAND CONTEXT FOR APPLICANTS The UnderShadow Universe is a creator-owned IP ecosystem centered on a classified intelligence organization mythology. The brand's published novels are written under the pen name 'A Hardly Scene.' The merchandise line is APEX Apparel. The CRM is called the Intelligence Network. Customers are Assets. Accounts are Operative Profiles. Rewards are Clearance Levels. If you are a strong Klaviyo technician but have never worked on a brand where every element of the customer experience is a form of storytelling — this project will challenge and excite you. We are not building a standard e-Commerce email list. We are building a classified organization that every customer wants to be a member of. The CRM is the world.
